faqs.question: Which courses does B S Anangpuria Institute of Technology and Management offer?
faqs.answer: B S Anangpuria Institute of Technology and Management provides programmes including B.E. / B.Tech, M.E./M.Tech, MCA, MBA/PGDM in streams such as Engineering, IT & Software, Business & Management Studies, and are excellent for students to build their careers. The institute has specializations in Civil Engineering, Computer Science Engineering, Electronics & Communication Engineering, Mechanical Engineering, Information Technology.

faqs.answer: The fees range for courses offerred by the B S Anangpuria Institute of Technology and Management is around INR 40000 - INR 315030.

fees_and_eligibility.overview: B S Anangpuria Institute of Technology and Management is an institute which offers various courses at UG and PG levels. Students can choose Full Time programmes from streams such as Engineering, Business & Management Studies and IT & Software. At the UG level, students can choose the available programmes such as B.E. / B.Tech, BCA and BBA. Talking about PG level, some of the available courses include M.E./M.Tech, MBA/PGDM and MCA. The fee structure for the B S Anangpuria Institute of Technology and Management programmes is around INR 40,000 to 3,15,030.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Information Technology - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: Good infrastructure and supportive faculty, with placements and scope for improvement.

review_content.Placements: The department attracts reputed recruiters from diverse sectors. Some of the top companies visiting the campus include IT & software Infosys, TCS, Wipro, HCL, Accenture and Capgemini. Core/technical are L&T, Siemens, Bosch, and Tata Technologies. Analytics & consulting are Deloitte, KPMG, EY, and PwC.
review_content.Infrastructure: There are spacious classrooms with projectors, smart boards, and audio-visual teaching aids. Computer labs with updated software and high-performance systems. Access to labs, projects, internships, and case studies that help apply knowledge in real-world scenarios.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Information Technology - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: Once upon a time, this college had a good reputation but now it's getting bad.

review_content.Placements: I'm currently studying in my second year of college, so there are no placements for my class. The average package offered is around 2–6 LPA in my course. There is not any such fixed recruiting company; however, Tata and some local firms recruit from the college. An internship has not been provided to us yet and we can't say if we will get it in the future.
review_content.Infrastructure: If we talk about the infrastructure of the college, the buildings are good, but there is not much on the campus, like long grounds and playgrounds. Classrooms are AC smart classrooms, but they don't run AC all the time and keep getting issues. The hostel facility is close after the COVID; the quality of food in the canteen is kind of okay, not much good; talking about medical facilities, their is a dispenser for students; normal headaches, wounds and other small treatments can be done. The sports ground is always close; it is opened almost once a year for college sports day tournaments only. There is not much encouragement for sports there.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Information Technology - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: Infrastructure is average, some facilities are good, some are poor, and placements are good.

review_content.Placements: In this college 4th year/5th semester, students are eligible for campus placements. Some recruiting companies include TCS, Iktara, HCL, etc. The highest package is INR 700000 LPA, and the average package is INR 400000 LPA. More than 50% of students are getting placements. Overall placements at this college are better.
review_content.Infrastructure: Facilities such as well-designed computer laboratories, a silent library, and well-comfortable classrooms with air-conditioned facilities are available. There are two canteens in the college that offer good-quality food, and the behavior of the ones sitting behind the counter of the canteen is good.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: Discipline is there in a very hard-working environment.

review_content.Placements: The percentage of students who are placed in college is around 30%. The average package is INR 3 lacs, while the highest package offered is INR 13 lacs. The top recruiting companies are TCS and Wipro. About 10 percent of students get internships in college.
review_content.Infrastructure: The Wi-Fi connectivity is very bad. The food offered in the canteen is just average. There is no hostel facility in college. The medical facility provided at the college is just okay. The labs are not ventilated and have dirty surroundings, while the class is fully ventilated.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: Our college enforces rules and regulations like a school.

review_content.Placements: Almost 50% of students got placed in this course. The highest salary package offered was 15 LPA. The average salary package offered was 3 LPA. Top recruiting companies are HCL, Wipro, and Infotech. Around 20-30% of students got internships in this course.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is very good. Classrooms are air-conditioned. Our campus is Wi-Fi enabled. Many laboratories are available in this college. There is a huge library on campus. Several books are available in the library. Our college does not provide hostel facilities. Sports are not conducted in this college.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: I would recommend joining this college.

review_content.Placements: Around 20% of students got internships. Top recruiting companies are Wipro, etc. Around 5% of students got placed in our college. The highest salary package offered is 12 LPA. The lowest salary package offered is 3 LPA. The top role offered is a software engineer.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our college is good and well-maintained. The food served in the mess is good. Our classrooms are well-maintained. They are equipped with air-conditioners. Wi-Fi facility is not available in our college. A playground is available in our college. Our college has 2 canteens.

The cutoffs are available in the form of ranks for different categories of students belonging to the AI and HS quotas. Candidates interested in taking admission at B S Anangpuria Institute of Technology and Management can check out the sections below to view the exam, course, and category-wise cutoff details. A few more updates are below:

B S Anangpuria Institute of Technology and Management cutoff 2025 was released via HSTES entrance exam for admission to the B.E. / B.Tech course. For the General AI category students, the last round cutoff was 468277 for B.E. / B.Tech admission. B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering turned out to be the most competitive branch for admission.
Considering the JEE Main last round cutoff 2025 for the General AI category students, the top most competitive course for admission was B.E. / B.Tech, with a cutoff rank closing at 468277.

highlights.summary: A few more updates are given below:

faqs.question: What is the scope of MBA?
faqs.answer:
The scope of MBA course is increasing day by day. MBA is one of the big job oriented professional programme and the most one which has been sought by the students. Once you have completed your degree, you have a great job opportunity in the industrial world. You may the manager or executive in term of designation.
The management term is most suited to the managers and that's why it is the way, where you can reach on the top of the height as soon as possible by using your leadership and working proficiency. An MBA professional always plays a vital role in his/her company and this is why he used to keep in touch with the board of directors. No need to specify the companies who recruit the MBA professionals. All sectors including government and public have various industries, companies, institutions or related organizations, come in the job prospective fields for an MBA professional.
Some job profiles are listed here:
Brand Manager
Account Manager
International Business Manager
Marketing Executive
Business Technical Consultant
All the best.

faqs.question: Is the BTech Mechanical Engineering syllabus the same for all colleges?
faqs.answer: The BTech Mechanical Engineering syllabus is not the same across all colleges, as every college committee sets a particular coursework pattern at the start of every academic year to be followed for the respective batch. The syllabus includes some core subjects, interesting electives, and lab work that gives detailed knowledge to the students about the workings of the field.

fees_and_eligibility.overview: At the UG and PG levels, SPSU - Sir Padampat Singhania University offers a diverse range of progammes. Candidates can choose Full Time and Part Time courses, from streams like Engineering, Business & Management Studies and IT & Software. College offers B.E. / B.Tech, BBA and UG Diploma courses at the UG level. While, at the PG level, the college offers available programmes like M.E./M.Tech, MBA/PGDM and M.Sc. The SPSU course fee ranges between INR 1,10,000 to 8,20,000.

review_summary.college_name: SPSU Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Good faculty, but placements are not good enough, and the infrastructure is not good enough.

content.Placements: 60 percent of students got placed from our course. 12 LPA is the highest, the lowest package is 3 LPA, and the average package is 6 LPA. Xebia and L&T are recruiting companies in our course. 50 percent of students got an internship from our course in the Xebia company.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is good in our course, and the classrooms are well-equipped with a digital board. Wi-Fi has issues in hostels, and the library is good, and claims maintenance. The quality of food is average, and the medical facilities are good at our university.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Balanced academics, infrastructure, and student life.

content.Placements: The highest package is around 13 LPA, and the lowest is 2 LPA-3 LPA, depending on skill set and specialization of students. Nearly everyone secures internships as part of their curriculum provided by L&T Xebia, and many other startup companies offer diverse roles.
content.Infrastructure: College provides good infrastructure for academic learning, equipped with well-maintained laboratories relevant to the course. The central library has a wide variety of textbooks, reference books, and resources for research and self-study. The mess and canteen food are hygienic.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: The college is the best for students.

content.Placements: The 60 percent of students got placed from our course. 12 LPA is the highest, the lowest package is 3 LPA, and the average package is 6 LPA. Xebia and L&T are recruiting companies in our course. 50 percent of students got an internship in our course in the Xebia company.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is good, and the classrooms are well-equipped with digital boards. Wi-Fi has issues in hostels, and the library is good, and claims maintenance. The quality of food is average, and the medical facilities are good in our university.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: The university is good for studying.

content.Placements: The percentage of students placed in our course is 60. The highest package is 12 LPA, the lowest is 3 LPA, and the average package is 6 LPA. Xebia and L&T are some of the recruiting companies. In our course, 50 percent of students got internships at Xebia.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is good in our course, and the classrooms are well-structured with digital boards. Wi-Fi does have issues in hostels. The library is good, and maintenance is claimed to be satisfactory. The quality of food is average, and the medical facilities are good at our university.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: It is a good college, they provide good education and skills, worth for it, good placements.

content.Placements: The students placed in our course are 300, and 90 percent are placed. In our college, the highest package is 13 LPA, the lowest is 3 LPA, and the average package is 5 LPA in B.Tech CSE. Companies like Xebia, L&T, Meetmux, and Rainbow Labs recruited students. 98 percent of students got internships from our college’s collaborated companies as SDE, AI engineer, ML engineer, FSD, DevOps, etc.
content.Infrastructure: Our college provides good Wi-Fi connections in the hostel and college. Food quality is very good compared to other universities. Sports, games, and NCC activities are available. There is a medical dispensary in the college and hostel, providing 24/7 services. Compared to other universities, our university is very good.

admission_overview.college_name: SPSU Admission 2025: Fees, Courses, Eligibility and Selection

admission_process.title: SPSU Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: SPSU admissions are based on merit. The institute considers applications of candidates meeting the eligibility criteria.SPSUoffers courses at UG, PG and Doctorate levels. Some of the courses include UG Diploma, BBA, MCA and M.Sc. Candidates can apply online for the preferred course.
The total tuition fees for UG courses isINR 3,60,000 - 8,20,000. Aspirants may also need to pay one-time caution deposit at the time of admission.
The institute offers UG courses for 3 years - 4 years. PG courses are offered for 27 months - 2 years.

courses_data.name: SPSU B.E. / B.Tech Admission 2025
courses_data.description: SPSUoffersB.E. / B.Techat the UG level. The course is offered via full time mode for a duration of 4 years.SPSU B.E. / B.Techadmissions require students to satisfy the admission criteria as set by the college. Students need to pass Pearson Undergraduate Entrance Exam, CUET, and SPSAT to be eligible for the course. Check below the eligibility criteria: Eligibility Criteria

placement_data.title: SPSU Placement Overview 2024
paragraphs: The University has released the 2023 placement statistics for Scholl of Engineering and Management. The highest package offered was INR 13.40 LPA and was made to School of Engineering students. Further, the average package for SoE and SoM was the same and the amount stood at INR 4.30 LPA . Around 51.30% of SoE and 46.70% of SoM students received multiple job offers . McKinsey, Ultratech, Infosys, and many other leading companies participated in SPSU Udaipur placements 2023.

reviews.review_heading: Good faculty, but placements are not good enough, and the infrastructure is not good enough.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is good in our course, and the classrooms are well-equipped with a digital board. Wi-Fi has issues in hostels, and the library is good, and claims maintenance. The quality of food is average, and the medical facilities are good at our university.

reviews.review_heading: Balanced academics, infrastructure, and student life.
reviews.review_text: College provides good infrastructure for academic learning, equipped with well-maintained laboratories relevant to the course. The central library has a wide variety of textbooks, reference books, and resources for research and self-study. The mess and canteen food are hygienic.

reviews.review_heading: The college is the best for students.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is good, and the classrooms are well-equipped with digital boards. Wi-Fi has issues in hostels, and the library is good, and claims maintenance. The quality of food is average, and the medical facilities are good in our university.

reviews.review_heading: The university is good for studying.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is good in our course, and the classrooms are well-structured with digital boards. Wi-Fi does have issues in hostels. The library is good, and maintenance is claimed to be satisfactory. The quality of food is average, and the medical facilities are good at our university.

reviews.review_heading: It is a good college, they provide good education and skills, worth for it, good placements.
reviews.review_text: Our college provides good Wi-Fi connections in the hostel and college. Food quality is very good compared to other universities. Sports, games, and NCC activities are available. There is a medical dispensary in the college and hostel, providing 24/7 services. Compared to other universities, our university is very good.

reviews.review_heading: Good college, best faculty, worth for feels.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms are spacious and equipped with modern furniture and LCD projectors. The library has over 400 books and seating space. The entire campus has Wi-Fi connectivity up to 1 Gbps. There are good laboratories, and a clean campus.

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied with college. Good placements in 2016, the infrastructure of hostels and classes is good.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the hostel and classes is good, but there are some issues with Wi-Fi in the hostels. The labs and systems are very good and in working condition. The food is average, and the medical facilities are good, with grounds and playing areas for outdoor games.

reviews.review_heading: Dissatisfied with the college faculty, rules, and very bad placement.
reviews.review_text: Hostels are just average, but the rules are extremely strict. Students are not allowed to go out even on weekends. The food quality is terrible for four days a week, and only somewhat decent for the other three, making hostel life dull, frustrating, and far from enjoyable.

reviews.review_heading: Please don't Join SPSU. Join any college so that your life is not spoiled.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is below average, and the Wi-Fi in the hostel campus is worse. Students often have problems with Wi-Fi, and also the library is so small that not even 1/500th of college students can attend it at the same time. The labs are in very bad condition, and there is no internet connection in the labs and classrooms. More than half of the classrooms still have blackboards and chalk.

reviews.review_heading: Campus is best and eco-friendly.
reviews.review_text: It has 24X7 Wi-Fi campus, digital library, digital classroom, sports facilities best, mess is clean, and best food for both north and south students. Overall, campus is eco-friendly, and no ragging campus.

reviews.review_heading: My experience at this college.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure and environment of the college are very positive. The faculty members are exceptionally supportive, and the labs and library create a conducive learning atmosphere. All facilities, including the mess and canteen, maintain high hygiene standards, and the medical facilities are top-notch. We also have access to comfortable hostel rooms, a gym, and numerous sports activities.

reviews.review_heading: The college has good infrastructure and facilities.
reviews.review_text: Coming facilities and infrastructure available for our course were really good, we will have smart classrooms, we can find peace of mind in our library, our library was not very spacious but almost every book was available. Our hostels are only 2 good sharing. The food was also very hygienic and delicious.

reviews.review_heading: Beautiful campus with greenery, decent teaching, and plans to improve placements.
reviews.review_text: The hostels are good, we have Wi-Fi, geysers in the bathroom, and the food is good. We have many sports which we can play, like football, cricket, badminton, etc. We have a common room in which we can watch TV. Hostel facilities are good. The library is open for students daily until 7 pm. We can sit and study there. We also have a canteen where we can get snacks, sanitary napkins, and foodstuff like pizza, pasta, fruit juice, cake, etc.

reviews.review_heading:
100% Placements in this university
Good Campus 
Good Sports Facilities
reviews.review_text: Hostels are good. Sports facilities are also good. They also conduct Esports tournaments. Mess and canteen are the best. WiFi in whole campus. Mess is very good. They follow hygiene and the food also taste very good. Labs are of latest technology, latest computers, latest processors.

reviews.review_heading: The infrastructure and facilities are really good.
reviews.review_text: The faculty and infrastructure are very good, and the quality of the hostel is excellent. Medical facilities are also very good. There is unlimited Wi-Fi and 24/7 electricity. Each room accommodates only two members with two cupboards and two desk tables, along with Ethernet slots. Hostel gates close at 9:30 pm.

student_insights.feedback: Strong alumni network that help with placement opportunities
Very Active and resourceful, college is also involved

fees_and_eligibility.overview: Gyan Ganga College of Technology (GGCT) offers diverse programmes at UG and PG levels in Full Time mode. The offered programmes can be chosen from streams such as Engineering, Business & Management Studies and IT & Software. At the UG level, candidates have the provision to opt from courses such as B.E. / B.Tech. Whereas, at PG level, Gyan Ganga College of Technology (GGCT) offers courses such as M.E./M.Tech, MBA/PGDM and MCA. Gyan Ganga College of Technology (GGCT) fee structure for all the courses is around INR 45,600 to 1,20,000.

faqs.answer: A:    Gyan Ganga College of Technology (GGCT) offers Degree and Diploma courses including 5 UG and 5 PG courses. Additionally, it also has After 10th Diploma courses. These programs are offerred in Full Time mode. Gyan Ganga College of Technology (GGCT) has specializations such as M.E./M.Tech specializations in Communications Engineering, Computer Science Engineering, Power Engineering, After 10th Diploma specializations in Civil Engineering, Computer Science Engineering, Electronics & Communication Engineering, Mechanical Engineering, B.Tech specializations in Electrical Engineering, Mechanical Engineering, Civil Engineering, Electronics & Communication Engineering, Computer Science Engineering.
faqs.question: What kind of specializations are available in courses offered at Gyan Ganga College of Technology (GGCT)?

faqs.answer: A:    Gyan Ganga College of Technology (GGCT) has courses such as M.E./M.Tech, After 1th Diploma, MCA, B.Tech, MBA/PGDM which are primarily in the stream of Engineering, IT & Software, Business & Management Studies. Gyan Ganga College of Technology (GGCT) has specializations such as M.E./M.Tech specializations in Communications Engineering, Computer Science Engineering, Power Engineering, After 10th Diploma specializations in Civil Engineering, Computer Science Engineering, Electronics & Communication Engineering, Mechanical Engineering, B.Tech specializations in Electrical Engineering, Mechanical Engineering, Civil Engineering, Electronics & Communication Engineering, Computer Science Engineering.
faqs.question: Which courses are offered by Gyan Ganga College of Technology (GGCT)?

faqs.answer:
A:    Gyan Ganga College of Technology (GGCT) has below criteria for taking admissions to it's various courses: CoursesEligibilityM.E./M.TechCandidate must have completed B.E./B.Tech. in relevant branch with mentioned percentage.
The mentioned SC/ST percentage is for Madhya Pradesh residents.
Candidate belonging to OBC (excluding creamy layer) categories of Madhya Pradesh should have at least 45%.
Bachelors degree should be of minimum of four years duration and have been obtained from any AICTE approved institution or Indian University/ Institute or from a foreign University recognised by AIU or any Institutes of national importance duly recognized by the MHRD, as equivalent thereto.
Candidates in the Final year of above degree examinations can also apply on provisional basis.
Rounding of marks or percentage is not permissible.After 10th DiplomaCandidate must have passed 10th class examination/SSC examination or equivalent examination from any recognised board/center (10+2) system.B.E. / B.TechCandidate must have completed 10+2 or equivalent with Physics, Maths & Chemistry/ Biotech./ Biology/ Tech. Voc. subject/ Comp. Sc./ IT/ Informatics Practices/ Agriculture/ Engineering Graphics/ Business studies as optional subjects with the above-mentioned aggregate percentage (40% for SC/ST/OBC candidates (except Creamy layer) candidates belonging to Madhya Pradesh) in subjects taken together.
Candidates passed 10+2 with grading system, must have grades equi. to mentioned aggregate %.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering (Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning) - Batch of 2028
reviews_list.review_title: It's a good technical college in Jabalpur and the best placement-giving college in Jabalpur.

review_content.Placements: Approximately 40-50% of students from my course are placed in jobs after graduation. The highest package offered is 65 lakh, while the average package is 3.3 lakh. Companies such as TCS, Infosys, Accenture, and many more companies recruit for our course. 30 to 40% of students got internships. Computer development and software development are the top roles offered in my course.
review_content.Infrastructure: The Wi-Fi is not working, and there are jammers present in all the college. Labs are good. Various types of instruments are available in the lab. The library is not good. The library has some issues that make it less effective for studying. The hostel facilities are good, but the food is average. Sports and games are unavailable during class hours.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering (Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning) - Batch of 2028
reviews_list.review_title: I'm satisfied with faculty.

review_content.Placements: About 90% of the students in my college enrolled in the course B.Tech and all of them chose the branch computer science, AIML, or AIDS. No one wants to become civil engineer, electrical engineer, etc. The highest package from my college is 81 LPA and the average package is 3 LPA.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the college is average. Theoretical classes are also quite good., but the main thing is that the lab facilities are very good and contain all the essential things for a very good understanding. Libraries are also very good but don't allow us to go.

faqs.answer: After JEE session 2 is completed, only those candidates who are aiming for IITs need to start preparing for JEE Advanced after clearing JEE Main. Those who are above the 98th percentile should start preparing for JEE Advanced as soon as possible. Those below this, between the 95th and 98th percentile, should focus on attempting more mock tests and previous year question papers so that they have a better chance of clearing JEE Advanced

overview_faqs.question: Is Gyan Ganga College of Technology (GGCT) a good college/Institute?
overview_faqs.answer: Gyan Ganga College of Technology (GGCT) is a reputed institute for M.E./M.Tech, After 1th Diploma, MCA, B.Tech, MBA/PGDM. Students can opt these programs to pursue their career in Engineering, IT & Software, Business & Management Studies. Institute has trained & experienced faculty who deliver these programs. Gyan Ganga College of Technology (GGCT) has a review rating of 3.8 on the basis of reviews by students. In addition to this, it has been rated 3.9 on campuslife, 3.7 on placements, 3.9 on faculty and 3.9 on Infrastructure.

review_summary.college_name: Gyan Ganga College of Technology (GGCT) Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering (Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning) - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Absolutely satisfied because of the placement.

content.Placements: Some students report promising placement outcomes with eligibility beginning from the 6th semester and recruitments from established companies like TCS Infosys Wipro Amazon HCL Jio etc. However data varies greatly. Some reviews mention average packages around 2.8 LPA the highest at 6.5 LPA and placement rates of around 60 percent.
content.Infrastructure: The modern campus (~10 acres, shared with GGITS) features smart classrooms, labs, an auditorium, computer centers, and Wi-Fi, along with a well-stocked library (15k+ books, journals, e-resources), sports facilities like cricket, football, basketball, indoor/outdoor games, and a gymnasium. The hostels are separate for boys and girls, with single/double sharing, and while some reviews praise their cleanliness and facilities, others mention small rooms and issues with mess food quality.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering (Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning) - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Satisfied because of faculty.

content.Placements: The highest package from my college is 1.11 crores since the first counseling and the average package is 3 LPA. In this year (2025), GGCT has achieved very good results, with nearly three students securing a package of more than 20 LPA. Almost 15 students received a package of 10 LPA. TCS is the top recruiter.
content.Infrastructure: The college has multiple Wi-Fi networks in different areas, all providing fast and excellent speed. I am not a hostel student, which means I don’t live in the hostel, so I don’t know much about the hostel facilities, but according to my friends (who used to live in the hostel), it doesn’t offer many amenities.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering (Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning) - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: It's a good technical college in Jabalpur and the best placement-giving college in Jabalpur.

content.Placements: Approximately 40-50% of students from my course are placed in jobs after graduation. The highest package offered is 65 lakh, while the average package is 3.3 lakh. Companies such as TCS, Infosys, Accenture, and many more companies recruit for our course. 30 to 40% of students got internships. Computer development and software development are the top roles offered in my course.
content.Infrastructure: The Wi-Fi is not working, and there are jammers present in all the college. Labs are good. Various types of instruments are available in the lab. The library is not good. The library has some issues that make it less effective for studying. The hostel facilities are good, but the food is average. Sports and games are unavailable during class hours.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering (Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning) - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: I'm satisfied with faculty.

content.Placements: About 90% of the students in my college enrolled in the course B.Tech and all of them chose the branch computer science, AIML, or AIDS. No one wants to become civil engineer, electrical engineer, etc. The highest package from my college is 81 LPA and the average package is 3 LPA.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the college is average. Theoretical classes are also quite good., but the main thing is that the lab facilities are very good and contain all the essential things for a very good understanding. Libraries are also very good but don't allow us to go.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering (Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning) - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: In this college, you can easily get placed if you listen to your teacher's advice.

content.Placements: According to college data, 55% of students got easily placed without any failure, 25% struggled for placement, and the remaining 20% are unemployed. My personal opinion is that approximately only 40% of students were placed easily. According to my opinion, colleges offer internships to students, and if students have skills and are willing to do internship, they can easily get.
content.Infrastructure: The college has its hostel approximately 1.5km away and the hostel facility is average in all terms. The college has a Wi-Fi facility but they don't tell its password. The canteen facility is also good in terms of quality food. Labs facility and lab faculty members are excellent.

faqs.question: What can students do after JEE Main session 2 result?
faqs.answer: After JEE session 2 is completed, only those candidates who are aiming for IITs need to start preparing for JEE Advanced after clearing JEE Main. Those who are above the 98th percentile should start preparing for JEE Advanced as soon as possible. Those below this, between the 95th and 98th percentile, should focus on attempting more mock tests and previous year question papers so that they have a better chance of clearing JEE Advanced

faqs.question: What is the eligibility to get admission in Gyan Ganga College of Technology (GGCT) for UG/PG courses?
faqs.answer:
Gyan Ganga College of Technology (GGCT) has below criteria for taking admissions to it's various courses:CoursesEligibilityM.E./M.TechCandidate must have completed B.E./B.Tech. in relevant branch with mentioned percentage.
The mentioned SC/ST percentage is for Madhya Pradesh residents.
Candidate belonging to OBC (excluding creamy layer) categories of Madhya Pradesh should have at least 45%.

review_summary.college_name: Bankura Unnayani Institute of Engineering Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: Pathfinder of Bankura, it's the way for those who want to pursue it from near home.

content.Placements: About 100% of students get a chance to be placed. Many big names attend to recruit us. They chose through many steps, not for the highest or the lowest CGPA but for good sense of humor and communication skills. They gave 2 LPA to 5 LPA packages at starting and more.
content.Infrastructure: College is in a good place from Bankura Town, there route to Bankura station nearby. Bus services are free to all from hostel to college and college to hostel. It has free use for college library. We have technical labs, play grounds, and all staffs.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Very good for those who are not financially sound, very affordable prices hostel and course.

content.Placements: Placements are very poor. Most of the students opt for M. Tech and CSE courses. Students mainly apply for TCS Ninja and Global-like companies. The lowest package is 3.5 LPA. The highest package is 7 LPA. Internships are very less and all are unpaid. AICTE provides internships. After covid, there has been a significant decline in placements.
content.Infrastructure: Classrooms are well, and Wi-Fi is also available. There is a decent library. Hostel is average but very affordable as 800 INR per month is charged. Fooding is different as you have to pay. Food charges are very minimal like 25 rupees for veg meal, etc.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Completely satisfied because I have gained course knowledge & have been placed in MNC companies .

content.Placements: The placement scenario is good at our college. Top recruiting companies like TCS, Cognizant, Medha Servo, Amazon, Capgemini, etc. visit our campus. Placement training is now going on in our college, and it is very useful for the students who are appearing for the placements. Top roles, like software development and managing director of projects, are offered to the students.
content.Infrastructure: Our college has very good infrastructure like labs and a good library with a lot of collections of books. The quality of facilities in our hostel and the quality of food available in the mess and canteen are good. We have a large playground we have separate grounds for volleyball, basketball, cricket, football, we also have an indoor room for table tennis, carrom, chess.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Review of BUIE College.

content.Placements: The college has good placements because placements are literally pretty good in the college, and there are also top recruiting companies offering jobs to the students for each branch. The highest package offered in our course is 10 lacs per year in the college.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure is simply neat. Facilities are provided for the students by the college. The mess is hygienic; the canteen has good quality food. Hostels are provided for the students in the college. Games, sports, libraries, and classrooms are all available in the college.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: I am satisfied with my college.

content.Placements: Nearly 80 students were placed in campus recruitment, and top recruiting companies like Amazon, Teach Mahindra, Infosys, and Wipro are offering more jobs. The highest package offered is 30 lacs per annum, and the lowest package offered is 3 lacs per annum.
content.Infrastructure: Facilities and infrastructure are available for our course and department, like Wi-Fi, classrooms, projectors, libraries, and labs. The quality of facilities in our hostels is good, the quality of food is good, and games are available for the students in college.

paragraphs: Bankura Unnayani Institute of Engineering admission 2025is currently open. The college offers BTech, BCA, BBA and MTech courses at the UG and PG level. To be admitted to the Bankura Unnayani Institute of Engineering, candidates must meet the eligibility criteria set by the college. The application process at theBankura Unnayani Institute of Engineeringis conducted online. Read the following article to know more about theBankura Unnayani Institute of Engineering course admission2025.

BUIE courses' admissions are based on entrance exam scores followed by counselling. Candidates must also fulfil the minimum eligibility requirements for the respective courses. The following table mentions the eligibility and selection forBankura Unnayani Institute of Engineering courses:
Course Name
Eligibility
Selection Criteria
WBJEE,JEE Main,JELET
Graduation with a 50% aggregate
GATE,WBUT PGET
Bankura Unnayani Instititute of Engineering admission process includes registration and application form evaluation. Candidates must follow the below steps to get a seat in BUIE:
STEP 1: Bankura Unnayani Instititute of Engineering Application Process 2025
Candidates are required to apply online on the official website of the institute. Students can also check the detailedBankura Unnayani Instititute of Engineering feestructure here.
STEP 2: Selection Rounds
Students will be selected based on entrance exams such as WBJEE, JEE Main, GATE etc, as per respective courses. For more clarity, students can check the table above.
STEP 3: Merit List andAdmission Confirmation
Once selection rounds are over, the institute releases a merit list. To allot and confirm the seat candidates are required to pay the application fee at the admission receipt centre.

hostel_campus.college_name: Bankura Unnayani Institute of Engineering Infrastructure Details & Reviews

hostel.description: Bankura Unnayani Institute of Engineering has separate hostel for boys and girls. Safety and security measures are very strong in all the 4 hostels, 2 for boys and 2 for girls. Full time wardens are there for girls’ and boys’ hostels. Medical facilities are available round the clock along with car facility in case of emergency. A guest house is also arranged for the accommodation of the guardians and ex-students. The hostel also provides residential quarters for the faculty members and non-teaching staffs are also situated within the hostel campus.

library.description: Bankura Unnayani Institute of Engineering's library has a collection of 36000 volumes, 4500 titles and e-journals of IEEE, ASME, Sciendirect, Springer, etc. The college library also provides the facility of reading room and photocopy.

reviews.review_heading: Review of BUIE College.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is simply neat. Facilities are provided for the students by the college. The mess is hygienic; the canteen has good quality food. Hostels are provided for the students in the college. Games, sports, libraries, and classrooms are all available in the college.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with my college.
reviews.review_text: Facilities and infrastructure are available for our course and department, like Wi-Fi, classrooms, projectors, libraries, and labs. The quality of facilities in our hostels is good, the quality of food is good, and games are available for the students in college.

reviews.review_heading: Excellent infrastructure and good faculty.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is excellent and Wi-Fi is also available in the campus only. Libraries, auditorium, classrooms, projectors, well-maintained washrooms, huge ground for playing, peaceful garden area, pleasant environment. Good food is provided in the canteen.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Bankura Unnayani Institute of Engineering.
reviews.review_text: In our course, there are different types of labs for every lab subject. There are also smart classrooms available. In our college campus, there is a high-speed Wi-Fi connection available. In our college, there are separate hostels for girls and boys. The hostel buildings are two-storied, and hostel rooms are big enough. In our hostel mess, three meals are provided to the students at a very effective cost. There is a big playground in the hostel where all sports are organized.

reviews.review_heading: The College is Very good.
reviews.review_text: If you choose CSE then you will get decent computer laboratory where you can do your tasks so well, Clean and big classrooms with good Wi-Fi connection, a decent library area. The hostel is also very well where you can live with your friends, roommates happily and it gives you home like feeling. You will not get any issue with the food quality. In hostel there is also a good madical facilities available.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with this college in all aspects.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college was good. Our college provided all the necessary facilities for all students. It provided free Wi-Fi with good speed. All classrooms were very good. They had projectors. Smart classrooms were available in our college. All labs were well-managed and clean. All important instruments were available in labs. There was a well-stocked national library with all books. We used to collect books by using our library cards. There were two separate hostels for boys and girl...

reviews.review_heading: It was a good journey as we gained knowledge and placements were average.
reviews.review_text: All the necessary facilities were available to us. Wi-Fi was available throughout the campus. The speed of the Wi-Fi was average. Our classrooms were cleaned and managed properly. Labs were so advanced, and suitable instruments were available for a lab class. There was a central library available with all the necessary books. We could collect our necessary books by using our library cards. The college infrastructure was good. There were two separate hostels available on campus, one for boys and ...

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied; good environment; average placements; good curriculum.
reviews.review_text: All the necessary facilities were available. The classrooms were clean and well managed. There were projectors in every classroom. Wi-Fi facilities were also available, and the speed of the Wi-Fi was good. The labs were also well managed and all the necessary instruments were also available. There was a central library present with all the books needed. There were two separate hostels for boys and girls in the campus. The hostel rooms were also clean. The food quality of the hostel was good. Med...

reviews.review_heading: College has a very beautiful campus.
reviews.review_text: Bankura unnyani institute of engineering college has a very beautiful campus. There is some game like cricket football etc. Played under the college professors. In this college whole campus has Wi-Fi in everywhere. It is for teachers and students. I love this college.

reviews.review_heading: The college is very good for B.Tech.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is not available in the old building of our college. But in the new building, Wi-Fi facility is available. Laboratories are available separately in different buildings. Classrooms are very big. There is a library with many books. The hostel is not clean. Canteen food is not good.

reviews.review_heading: BANKURA UNNYANI INSTITUTE OF ENGINEERING has all the necessary equipments. Campus is too large.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi, library and labs are available in the college. The college should improve its quality of food. Medical facilities are available in the college. Sports are also played.

reviews.review_heading: A college with good infrastructures and facilities.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms are available for all the courses. Labs of every department are also available. There is central library in the center of our campus. CCTVs are there in every corner of the campus for the safety of the students. Hostel facilities are available for both boys and girls. Food quality is average in the hostel mess and in the college canteen. There is also a sports and cultural room in our college. Medical aid is also available in case of any emergency.

reviews_list.review_title: The best of Gujarat's Education in a nutshell.

review_content.Placements: In our batch, in the second year itself, we were recruited by various companies for internships and offered stipends too. Top recruiting companies are Redhat, Wipro, Infosys, IBM (Official Collaboration). Almost 100% of students acquired Internships and 95% acquired placement.

review_summary.college_name: ICT Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering (Cyber Security) - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Overall I will say Excellent in Faculty, Syllabus, etc. Absolutely satisfied with placement.

content.Placements: As we know this college is a 3rd tier college, and the education provided here is really outstanding. Courses and curricula designed for students semester-wise are very beneficial to gain knowledge easily in any field. Placement here is not so well, but we can say 70-80% will get placement offers because, in the end, students' overall CGPA also matters. I have no idea about the package, but the average package is 4-8 Lacs, and companies like Cisco also give placements, Red Hat, Electromech, etc.
content.Infrastructure: In our university, the facility is outstanding. There are sports grounds for all sports: tennis, football, cricket, running track, etc., a swimming pool, gym, classrooms with Wi-Fi, labs, and a library for all departments, etc. They have provided different hostels for different branches. The food quality is also very nice and not so costly. Also, for out-of-state students, there is a different canteen.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering (Cyber Security) - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Ganpat University is a place of education.

content.Placements: I am in a cyber security course at Ganpat University. It gives a placement in IBM, Infochips, Amazon, Adani, Infosys, etc., Around 85% of the student placed every year in these companies. They provide jobs as a trainee under expert hackers. The average package is 5LPA. The highest Package is 50 LPA. The lowest package is 3LPA. Around all students get an internship in the above companies.
content.Infrastructure: The classroom at Ganpat University is the best and most fantastic. The college campus provide Wi-Fi in the classroom and campus, the classroom has an internal air-conditioner fitted with a projector and whiteboard, etc., In the campus, it has a library which provides all types of book, from education to financial book with all types of labs. The SGVP hostel is the best which is located on sg highway, Charrodi. Provide the best food and the living accommodation.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering (Cyber Security) - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: The best of Gujarat's Education in a nutshell.

content.Placements: In our batch, in the second year itself, we were recruited by various companies for internships and offered stipends too. Top recruiting companies are Redhat, Wipro, Infosys, IBM (Official Collaboration). Almost 100% of students acquired Internships and 95% acquired placement.
content.Infrastructure: We have a supercomputer available for the students for heavy technical tasks and projects. The campus is a kind of corporate type and the environment is completely technical-friendly. Classrooms are Air-Conditioned with advanced computer systems with Linux and windows depending on usage.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering (Big Data and Analytics) - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: The best learning experience for Computer Science and Engineering.

content.Placements: Here there are the best placements, 70-80% of students were offered internships from college. Roles like Data Analytics, Cyber Security, Data Scientist, Cloud-Based Application, Cloud Engineer, Big Data Engineer, and many other roles are fulfilled by our college.
content.Infrastructure: We have proper infrastructure. Labs are well-equipped. Wi-Fi is available throughout the campus. We have an on-campus canteen area to hang out or to chill or have food. The classrooms are big and well maintained. Our campus is equipped with complete centralized AC.

individual_reviews.course: - Batch of 2021
individual_reviews.title: A short overview of ICT, GUNI.

content.Placements: Almost 75% of the students in my batch secured placements from my course. While the highest package was 8 lacs, the lowest was 2.5 lacs INR. The average package for our batch was 3.5 lacs INR. Top recruiting companies for my course included Cred, eInfochips, and Tata consultancy services. All students in my batch landed internships. Examples of internship offering companies include Bisag, einfochips, Yudiz, etc. Top roles like Software engineer, cloud specialist, and data scientist were offered to students.
content.Infrastructure: College is facilitated with amenities like Wi-Fi, Projectors, and a library. While there is no actual campus, students can find carom, table tennis, and other indoor game facilities in the basement, next to the parking facility. All of these facilities are barebones and offer nothing more than a standard experience.

Admissions are based on the candidate's rank in the GUJCET exam and other criteria such as the availability of seats and the candidate's performance in previous academic records. So, scoring more than 70% is better to get into the race of admissions atInstitute of Computer Technology, Ganpat University.

highlights.summary:
The COMEDK UGET 2026 registration last date for K.S. School of Engineering and Management admission to the BE/BTech programme has been extended till Mar 20, 2026. Also, the COMEDK UGET exam 2026 will be held on May 9, 2026.

A few more updates are given below:

student_insights.feedback: Students can work with faculty on research projects
Strong alumni network that help with placement opportunities
Very Active and resourceful, college is also involved

fees_and_eligibility.overview: offers a wide range of programmes at both UG and PG levels. With option for Full Time learning, students can choose from several streams such as Engineering and Business & Management Studies. At the UG stage, courses available include B.E. / B.Tech. For the PG level, there is a wide range of courses like M.E./M.Tech and MBA/PGDM. K.S. School of Engineering and Management fee structure ranges between INR 3,38,384 to 7,44,444.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: The campus is huge and the resting area is available.

review_content.Placements: 70% of students got placed while they were in the internship. The highest is 7 LPA, the average is 4 LPA, and the lowest is 3 LPA. The main companies are Honda and Kia and some manufacturing companies and even some production companies visited for interviews. 100% of students got internships. Roles offered is design head.
review_content.Infrastructure: Labs, Wi-Fi, projectors, classrooms, machines, department library, etc., are available. Food is average and the sports and games are the main attraction. There is only a first-aid box in the department office and there are no specialized aids. There is a basketball, badminton, and a cricket ground.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Artificial Intelligence and Data Science - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: The college is good and campus life everything except placements.

review_content.Placements: 50-60% of students got placed. The minimum package is 6 LPA. There are many companies where other departments people get placed. Almost everyone is placed for the internship. The internship can be done both offline and online, so it's easy for students to gain industry experience.
review_content.Infrastructure: Hostel is good but food might be a problem as they don't change their menu and they don't provide laundry which might be a problem. The rooms are cleaned daily but sometimes you are the rules so it might be a problem if they don't clean it. If you are like very highly make I don't I think you have to make like tell them to every day.

faqs.answer: The BTech Mechanical Engineering syllabus is not the same across all colleges, as every college committee sets a particular coursework pattern at the start of every academic year to be followed for the respective batch. The syllabus includes some core subjects, interesting electives, and lab work that gives detailed knowledge to the students about the workings of the field.
faqs.question: Q: Is the BTech Mechanical Engineering syllabus the same for all colleges?

faqs.answer: Dear candidate, the subject of Machine Design basically teaches you about the designing fundamentals of various types of machinery across industries. You get to learn about the different ways in which elements can be combined to form an equipment or machine system and get the work done in an effective manner.The knowledge of this subject is very important for a mechanical engineer as he/she will have to put this to use in the future whenever they enter the workforce as a mechanical engineering professional.Hope this cleared your doubt. Have a good day.
faqs.question: Q: What is covered in Machine Design subject in B.Tech course?

faqs.answer: The average BTech CSE salary for graduates in India can range between INR 4 LPA and INR 12 LPA. The scope of the BTech CSE programme in India is excellent and hence the starting salary packages offered by recruiters are also high as compared to some other engineering courses.The salary depends on factors like the years of experience you hold, your academic qualification, skill set, etc. Once you enter the industry and get some years of experience in hand, you will get a higher salary package. But, in the starting of your career journey, you can expect between INR 4 LPA and INR 6 LPA.

Also, the field projects also allow students to apply their B Tech Civil Engg. skills and knowledge to design and implement communication systems.

overview_faqs.question: What is the average BTech Computer Science Engineering salary in India?
overview_faqs.answer: The average BTech CSE salary for graduates in India can range between INR 4 LPA and INR 12 LPA. The scope of the BTech CSE programme in India is excellent and hence the starting salary packages offered by recruiters are also high as compared to some other engineering courses.The salary depends on factors like the years of experience you hold, your academic qualification, skill set, etc. Once you enter the industry and get some years of experience in hand, you will get a higher salary package. But, in the starting of your career journey, you can expect between INR 4 LPA and INR 6 LPA.

review_summary.college_name: K.S. School of Engineering and Management Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Good infrastructure and average placements.

content.Placements: 90% of students got placed in good companies. The average package is 5 LPA, and the highest package is 11 LPA. The top Recruiting companies are Toyota, SolarEdge, Tata, etc. The roles offered in this branch are automotive, CAD/CAM designing, 3D printing, automotive engineering, etc. The placements are very good in the college.
content.Infrastructure: The college offers solid infrastructure like a modern and green campus, smart classes well-equipped with an auditorium, library, sports court, and Wi-Fi. Canteen food is very good, tasty, healthy, and affordable. They provide a college bus for day scholars, a very big campus.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Cool in studies, but it doesn't mean you're industry-ready

content.Placements: About 60% of students, including myself, secured placements from our college, with an average package offered between 3 LPA and 3.5 LPA, and key recruiters included Evess Recruitech, TCS, and 1M1B, additionally, 100% of students completed internships as it was a mandatory subject, leading to common roles like marketing manager and HR.
content.Infrastructure: Facilities and infrastructure in our department were okay. Hostel facilities were also just okay, mainly due to the food's taste. While we have good sports competitions every semester, and the sports teacher is friendly, they are not always available.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: The campus is huge and the resting area is available.

content.Placements: 70% of students got placed while they were in the internship. The highest is 7 LPA, the average is 4 LPA, and the lowest is 3 LPA. The main companies are Honda and Kia and some manufacturing companies and even some production companies visited for interviews. 100% of students got internships. Roles offered is design head.
content.Infrastructure: Labs, Wi-Fi, projectors, classrooms, machines, department library, etc., are available. Food is average and the sports and games are the main attraction. There is only a first-aid box in the department office and there are no specialized aids. There is a basketball, badminton, and a cricket ground.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Artificial Intelligence and Data Science - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: The college is good and campus life everything except placements.

content.Placements: 50-60% of students got placed. The minimum package is 6 LPA. There are many companies where other departments people get placed. Almost everyone is placed for the internship. The internship can be done both offline and online, so it's easy for students to gain industry experience.
content.Infrastructure: Hostel is good but food might be a problem as they don't change their menu and they don't provide laundry which might be a problem. The rooms are cleaned daily but sometimes you are the rules so it might be a problem if they don't clean it. If you are like very highly make I don't I think you have to make like tell them to every day.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Good that's all. Great with infrastructure not with that quality.

content.Placements: Our college placement cell brought nearly 50 companies that are almost non-technical. Almost 70% of the students got placed in that. I feel really bad not even 10 students get full-time job offers in IT basically. They bring companies looking for BDA or call center jobs. No top companies are offered. The lowest salary is 1.5 LPA, and the highest salary is 9 LPA. Rest other students are waiting for technical are still waiting.
content.Infrastructure: KSSEM has no compromises with its infrastructure, it's really great, spacious, and neat. Wi-Fi works well, but no network. Classrooms are great, very spacious, and neat. CSE is good, and I feel jealous of our juniors. They are getting trained well for placements.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with the teaching and campus infrastructure but disappointed with the placement.
reviews.review_text: Our college has three blocks. I like the infrastructure of our college. It is filled with greenery and is also well-maintained. The library is quite large and has a lot of books that are very useful. The worst part of our college is the canteen. Our canteen does not provide hygienic food, and there is no proper ventilation or sunlight inside. There is a bas...

reviews.review_heading: Summarising about our college's peaceful, neat, and big campus.
reviews.review_text: College infrastructure has code. Every floor has installed Wi-Fi and paint. College offers Wi-Fi for every student but there are separate user names and separate rooms are available in the hostel. They provide three times food and during the lunch hours, other students can avail the food in the canteen. Every hostel room is neat and clean for every student. Separate wardrobes have been allotted and there is a guardian for hostel. There are medical facilities and for every hour this shuttle bus r...

reviews.review_heading: Review of K.S. School of Engineering and Management.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is good as compared to KSIT College. KSSEM has more space and boy's hostel is in KSSEM college itself. The canteen is not so satisfying. We complained regarding this, and they said they will change the canteen. Xerox shop is available, and there is no need to worry about it.

reviews.review_heading: The infrastructure is excellent, faculty members are friendly, and placements are average.
reviews.review_text: There are fully equipped labs and seminar halls for this course and other courses too. Classrooms are highly ventilated and spacious. There is a huge library with thousands of books and access to e-resources. There are separate hostels for both boys and girls. The canteen food is average. There is a mud ground, four badminton courts, and a basketball court for various sports activities.

reviews.review_heading: I am very happy with the faculty members and the beautiful infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is really good. Wi-Fi is provided, and labs are average. Facilities in the hostel are average but the food is really good. It gives us good quality and quantity of food which is really appreciative. The campus is also good, hygienic, and lush green.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with my faculty members and facilities.
reviews.review_text: Labs are well-maintained with good Wi-Fi, equipment, and systems. We also have a very big library. Food in the canteen is average and not that hygienic. It conducts sports 2-3 times a year. We have a badminton court and basketball courts.

reviews.review_heading: The college life is good here.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is good as per a college. The library is good. There is no scope for any sport. The sitting area here is absolutely good. But this college is good compared to any other tier 3 college.

reviews.review_heading: College is value for money.
reviews.review_text: Campus is vast, and has all the facilities. The buildings may look a little bit outdated and need some renovation. Classrooms and labs have all the necessary equipment. Even hostel facility is good as heard from my friends. The hostel is kept clean, and the food there is tasty and healthy. We even have a ground to play cricket, football, basketball, and badminton court.

review_content.General: Talking about the facilities and infrastructure available for students, they are quite poor. Aside from the library, most other amenities are lacking. The main building is not well-maintained, and the classrooms and labs lack essential facilities. There is no Wi-Fi available on campus, and the only student club, the Relish Club, has shut down due to mishandling and lack of funds, resulting in no extracurricular activities or sports events being held. While there are no canteen facilities within the college, students can enjoy the canteen available at the main campus of Vinoba Bhave University.

reviews_list.review_title: It is not bad, it is just an average college.

review_content.Placements: Not many companies visit the college; placement is not good, but it is state government. Maybe they do better in the future, but currently placement is average. If you want to go for higher education (M.Tech., MBA, etc.), then you can consider this college.
review_content.Infrastructure: College infrastructure is average, but the university area is quite big, and there is only a girls hostel; for boys, you have to visit PG near the university or college, but there are some hostel facilities outside the campus, university, or college, and also many mess options are there.

reviews_list.review_title: Dissatisfied because there are no placements or facilities for practical experience.

review_content.Placements: No direct companies come here for placements. Students participate in off-campus drives. Only around 10% of students got placed. Internships are done by students. The college never offers any internships for students. A high number of students got placed.

content.Infrastructure: Talking about the facilities and infrastructure available for students, they are quite poor. Aside from the library, most other amenities are lacking. The main building is not well-maintained, and the classrooms and labs lack essential facilities. There is no Wi-Fi available on campus, and the only student club, the Relish Club, has shut down due to mishandling and lack of funds, resulting in no extracurricular activities or sports events being held. While there are no canteen facilities within the college, students can enjoy the canteen available at the main campus of Vinoba Bhave University.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: It is not bad, it is just an average college.

content.Placements: Not many companies visit the college; placement is not good, but it is state government. Maybe they do better in the future, but currently placement is average. If you want to go for higher education (M.Tech., MBA, etc.), then you can consider this college.
content.Infrastructure: College infrastructure is average, but the university area is quite big, and there is only a girls hostel; for boys, you have to visit PG near the university or college, but there are some hostel facilities outside the campus, university, or college, and also many mess options are there.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2020
individual_reviews.title: Dissatisfied because there are no placements or facilities for practical experience.

content.Placements: No direct companies come here for placements. Students participate in off-campus drives. Only around 10% of students got placed. Internships are done by students. The college never offers any internships for students. A high number of students got placed.
content.Infrastructure: There is no Wi-Fi on the campus. There are only 2 labs for electronics students, and there are no separate labs like optical fiber lab, microwave lab, communication lab etc. Only a few girls' hostels are available combined for all departments like law, PG etc.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: It has good faculty, and great campus, but the placements should be improved.

content.Placements: The placements are not good in the computer science branch because of the lack of tech companies, but in other branches, 90% of students got placed in companies like Tata Steel etc. The highest package offered is about 8 LPA, and the lowest package is 3 LPA.
content.Infrastructure: The syllabus is the same as all engineering colleges. Facilities are good. Labs are well developed and have all modern technologies. Boys' hostel is not available on campus, but there are various hostels and flats available outside. Girls' hostel is available inside the campus.

There are two libraries, one is a central library, and another is a department library. Facilities like a canteen and ground for sports are also available here.

reviews.review_heading: It has a good environment for studying because teachers are friendly, and students are helpful.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms, labs and a library are in average condition. Our college doesn't have any hostel facilities, but some there are canteens where food quality is average. Medical facilities are good, but sports and games are not more adorable in our college.

reviews.review_heading: I suggest you select the best college to secure your career.
reviews.review_text: Our college provides quite enough facilities like water coolers with refrigerator, Wi-Fi, Cad lab, computer labs with a lot of systems, Chemistry lab, electronics lab and Physics lab. It also has a workshop, library with sufficient books, smart classrooms, etc.

reviews.review_heading: In this college placement is good and it has canteen facility.

Hostel facility is best for girls, boys hostel facility is not available at this time. In mess and canteen food facility is good and medical facility is good and sport is very good in this college .

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with the teachers and infrastructure, but our college is the worst for placements.
reviews.review_text: Some of the common facilities are library in good condition, Wi-Fi with a limited range of few MS building in good condition. For sports, students are only interested in cricket. Other than this, there is no participation and also no guidance. There is no facility for the hostel. Only a few students get this opportunity.

reviews.review_heading: Well connected infrastructure with ample placement opportunities
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is well connected with the main city. College building is very large which includes different blocks of library, computer labs, chemistry lab, physics lab, etc. Computer lab has wi-fi availability for both students as well as faculty members. There is a big library building which is full of course related books are journals. College also include hostel facility with a huge and hygienic mess. But boys hostel is under construction though it will be completed befor...

reviews.review_heading: Review of University College of Engineering and Technology, Hazaribag.
reviews.review_text: The college has excellent facilities like library, classrooms, labs, Wi-Fi etc. The college infrastructure is not bad, but that is not really like an engineering college. The college canteen is good. Medical facilities are available on campus. Sports and games are conducted.

reviews.review_heading: The college doesn't provide exposure and technical support.
reviews.review_text: The facilities are improving every year, and still, it is not up to the mark. While entering college, it seems we are in school. I am a graduate from Kendriya Vidyalaya, and my school was almost 3 times bigger than this. The funds are raised every year for the infrastructure. Few more facilities are Wi-Fi, but after logging in, we can only use 32 Mb. Lifts are available, but it is still under construction. When we were in 1st year in 2017, we were told that within one year, our college will have...

reviews.review_heading: The college is not worth and waste of time.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is poor. Our college needs to spend the amount given by the government on students and campus. Management is totally poor in giving good facilities to students. The government needs to take a big step to revive this institution.

reviews.review_heading: It is an average college, but professors are good.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is quite feasible here.

The BTech exams are scheduled for May 12 to May 15, and on May 18, 2026, followed by the BPharma exam on May 19 and May 20, 2026.

faqs.answer: The admission process for courses at Adikavi Nannaya University is entrance based for all the courses. For admissions to different programmes candidates are required to appear for different entrance exams such as the Andhra Pradesh CETs. The performance of candidates in the entrance decides whether they will get the final admission offer or not.
faqs.question: Q: What is the admission process for the Adikavi Nannaya University?

faqs.answer: Adikavi Nannaya University cutoff 2024 for Round 1 has been released for BTech courses in the form of opening and closing ranks. The Adikavi Nannaya University Andhra Pradesh EAMCET cutoff 2024 ranged between 25678 and 116677. The most competitive course for General Home State category candidates was the BTech in Computer Science and Engineering specialisation, with a cutoff rank of 25678 offered through Andhra Pradesh EAMCET scores, followed by counselling. Candidates seeking admission to Adikavi Nannaya University can refer to the table given below to check out the Andhra Pradesh EAMCET year-wise cutoffs:Course20232024B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering2934525678B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering4119942171B.Tech. in Electronics and Instrumentation Engineering122342116677B.Tech.8 in Civil Engineering125091101354B.Tech. in Mechanical Engineering120291107665
faqs.question: Q: What is the cut off for various courses at Adikavi Nannaya University?

faqs.answer: Yes, BPharma is available at Adikavi Nannaya University. The BPharma course is a four-year programme approved by the Pharma Council of India. The UG-level programme is divided into eight semesters. Further, there is lateral-entry admission to the third semester of the BPharma programme, which lasts for three years. BPharma admission is based on Andhra Pradesh EAPCET. However, applicants should first qualify the eligibility criteria of BPharma, i.e., Class 12 or equivalent examination pass from a recognised board with the required minimum aggregate. Candidate should have passed the qualifying exam with English as one of the subjects and Physics, Chemistry, Mathematics, and Biology as optional subjects.

review_summary.college_name: Adikavi Nannaya University Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. (Mathematics, Statistics, Computers) - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Want to take a great decision, chose Aditya.

content.Placements: We get a very high percentage of selections for placements and got great careers in MNC companies. Our friend got the highest package of the year, like 24 LPA in AI 27/7 company. The lowest package is 4.7 LPA. We have very good top recruiting companies like Cogent, Deloitte, TCS. Almost 100 percent of students get internships. The top roles companies offered are developer.
content.Infrastructure: We have a lot of facilities available in Aditya Degree College, Rajahmundry, facilities like large classrooms, libraries, and labs with free Wi-Fi for everyone. The quality of facilities in the hostel is absolutely brilliant. We are thankful that we have very hygienic and tasty food in the canteen. They also provide good medical facilities for free.

individual_reviews.course: B.Com. in Computers - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: It is the most reputed and recommended college.

content.Placements: Our campus achieved a 100 percent placement record last year. The highest package offered is 8.5 LPA, and the lowest package offered is 2.5 LPA. Top recruiting companies like Deloitte, TCS, and many well-reputed companies hire students. There is a 100 percent internship record in my course. Students got internships in many top MNCs and BPOs. Roles like associate, analyst, auditor, business development executive, and customer service are offered.
content.Infrastructure: We are provided with Wi-Fi, labs, good classrooms, and a library with excellent nooks and a student-friendly environment. Although we don't have a hostel facility. It takes care of our health and basic hospitality. The canteen menu is very limited but hygienic.
