individual_reviews.title: The college offers good placement opportunities.

content.Placements: Nearly 85% of students in my course get placed. The highest package is 50 LPA, while the lowest package is 14 LPA. Top recruiting companies include VC Teach Robotics and others. Around 75% of students secure internships with TCS and companies in the robotics and electrical sectors.
content.Infrastructure: The college provides excellent facilities. Wi-Fi is fast and reliable, labs are well-equipped, and the overall quality of facilities is very high. Hostels and food are tasty and healthy. The mess serves good meals. Medical facilities are available for emergencies. Sports and games are well-supported. The college has a spacious ground for activities.

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. (Computer Science, Statistics, Data Science) - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Aditya College is a good choice to join.

content.Placements: The student placement percentage is 80% according to my friends. The biggest package is 55 LPA, and the smallest package is 10 LPA. The top recruitment areas are data analysis. 70% of students get internships in the I-Link company with data management. Top roles are in statistics and data science.
content.Infrastructure: Facilities are okay, good, and well-maintained for my group. Wi-Fi is available. The hostel is good, and the food quality is tasty. Medical facilities are good. Sports facilities are excellent, with outdoor games twice a week.

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. (Hons.) in Artificial Intelligence - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Review of Aditya Degree College, Rajahmundry.

content.Placements: 70-80% of students were placed in my course, Artificial Intelligence. To my knowledge, the highest package is 8 lakhs per annum, and the lowest package is 2.5 lakhs per annum. Top recruiters are TCS, Deloitte, etc. 70% of students were selected for internships. The top role offered is developer.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is the worst because the classrooms were built with sheds. There is no comfort to sit in the class, especially in summer when the climate is hot. We are unable to sit in the class. There is no Wi-Fi availability for students. The labs are using i3 processors, 4th generation; the systems are so laggy, and some computers don’t work properly. There are no sports facilities in our college.

admission_process.title: Adikavi Nannaya University Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: The admission 2025is conducted via an entrance-based process. The institute offers a variety of courses such as BTech, BA, LLB, etc. The institute offers UG and PG courses for candidates. Candidates must fill out the application form on the official website ofAdikavi Nannaya Universityto register themselves for their desired course. Candidates are required to appear for the AP CETs in order to participate in the admission process.

At the undergraduate and postgraduate level, the University provides a range of engineering, Management, Law, and courses from various other fields. To have a chance of getting a spot in the course they want, candidates must take part in the entrance-based admissions procedure. The courses are available offline and full-time. Use the table below to find out more about the university's highlights:
Particulars
Mode of study
Programmes Offered
50+ courses including various specialisations
How to apply?
https://aknu.edu.in/DOA/courses.php
Level of programmes offered
Popular programmes
NOTE:The information available in the above table is sourced from the official website.

The University offers a variety of undergraduate and postgraduate courses for candidates who are interested in taking admission in the university. Candidates must meet the eligibility standards and follow the screening procedure in order to be considered for the final admission offer. The table below shows the eligibility and selection requirements forAdikavi Nannaya University courses:

The University offers courses at the UG and PG course levels. Candidates who clear the entrance-based admission process are given the offer to pay the fee and secure their seat in the course. The number of candidates who are shortlisted depends on the seat intake for the particular course. Check out the table below to learn more aboutAdikavi Nannaya University feeand seat intake:
NOTE:The information available in the above table is sourced from the official website.

The initial stage in the admissions procedure is registration. Both the needed entrance exam and the desired course must be applied for by candidates. Candidates are shortlisted for admission based on how well they performed on the entrance exams. The sequential admissions process is described below:

The application process for admissions are ongoing on the official website of the institute. Candidates are required to fill out their details and submit the form to successfully register for the programme. For any queries related to the application form, candidates can reach out to the number mentioned on: https://aknu.edu.in/DOA/courses.php

Candidates are shortlisted based on their performance in the entrance exams conducted by the university. Candidates are required to appear for the CET which is required for their desired course. Candidates who are shortlisted go further in the admission rounds.

Candidates who clear the cutoff in the CETs get the final admission offer from the university. Candidates are required to confirm their seat by paying the required fee for their course. Candidates are also required to appear for the document verification round in order to prove the details they have provided in the application and other forms.

faqs.question: What is the admission process for the Adikavi Nannaya University?
faqs.answer: The admission process for courses at Adikavi Nannaya University is entrance based for all the courses. For admissions to different programmes candidates are required to appear for different entrance exams such as the Andhra Pradesh CETs. The performance of candidates in the entrance decides whether they will get the final admission offer or not.

faqs.question: Can I join Adikavi Nannaya University without JEE Mains?
faqs.answer: Admissions to Adikavi Nannaya University are based upon candidates performance in different Ap CETs. Candidates must go through the selection criteria for their desired course to find out the entrance they need to apply for to get admission. Adikavi Nannaya University does not accept JEE Mains for admission intake into any course. Candidates must only appear for the university conducted entrance and secure their seat.

faqs.question: Can I join Adikavi Nannaya University directly?
faqs.answer: You cannot enrol directly in Adikavi Nannaya University. Prior to anything else, you must pass your 10+2 or equivalent test with at least 50% of the possible points. Adikavi Nannaya University's entrance exam must also be passed in order to be admitted to the appropriate programme. The Andhra Pradesh State Council of Higher Education administers the entrance test for B.Tech programmes at Adikavi Nannaya University (APSCHE).The university itself administers the admission exam for its M.Tech programmes at Adikavi Nannaya University. The exam is held in June each year. The university of Adikavi Nannaya administers the entrance exam for additional undergraduate and graduate programmes. The university website announces the dates and specifics of the exams.

faqs.question: How can I get BPharma admission in Adikavi Nannaya University?
faqs.answer: Candidates must complete the Adikavi Nannaya University admission process to get admission to the BPharma course. The admission process includes the application process, selection process, counselling, and final admission. Before proceeding with the admission process, make sure to qualify for the eligibility criteria of the BPharma course. Eligible candidates must visit the official website of Andhra Pradesh EAMCET and fill out the exam application form. Once the exam is concluded, candidates are shortlisted based on the scores obtained in the exam. Further, shortlisted candidates must go through the Andhra Pradesh EAMCET counselling process for seat allocation in the participating universities (Adikavi Nannaya University). After the seats are allocated, candidates must pay the Adikavi Nannaya University BPharma course fee to finalize the admission.

tables.context: What is the highest package of Adikavi Nannaya Uni

faqs.question: What is the highest package of Adikavi Nannaya University?
faqs.answer: The university has not released the highest package offered for the year 2023. However, as per Shiksha review, the highest package and other placement details that took place for BTech in Electronics and Instrument Engineering during the recent placement drive are mentioned in the table below: Particulars Statistics the highest package INR 3.60 LPA the lowest package INR 1.80 LPA Placement rate Above 75% Note: The placement stats mentioned are gathered from Shiksha review. Hence, the stats may vary further.

faqs.question: How are MBA placements at Adikavi Nannaya University?
faqs.answer: The placements at the Adikavi Nannaya University for the MBA Programme are okay. The median salary package that was offered to the students of this institution was Rs. 60,000 per annum. The median salary package offered to students in 2021 was 68,000. But it decreased from 68,000 to 60,000 in 2022, when compared to the previous year. A total of 53 MBA students were placed during the placements of 2023 as per the NIRF report. This University also has a rating of 4.1 for the placements.

faqs.question: Does Adikavi Nannaya University offer better placements than Sri Vani Group of Institutions?
faqs.answer: Adikavi Nannaya University (ANU) and Sri Van Group of Institutions (SVIG) both offer internships to B.Tech graduates. However, ANU has a stronger investment history and has established ties with leading companies across India. According to the ANU placement report for the academic year 2022-2023, the average salary package for B.Tech graduates was Rs 7.5 Lacs per annum. The biggest salary package offered was 25 Lacs per year. Top recruiters for ANU B.Tech are Infosys, TCS, Wipro, Amazon and Microsoft. According to the SVIG placement report for the academic year 2022-23, the average salary package for B.Tech graduates was 6 Lacs per annum. The biggest salary package offered was 15 Lacs per year. Top recruiters of SVIG B.Tech graduates are TCS, Infosys, Wipro and Amazon.

Centre for Science and Technology, Thiruvananthapuram, a government of Kerala undertaking. Adequate infrastructure and laboratory facilities have been created over the years in various departments to meet the requirements of different courses as per the existing curriculum, along with a pool of experienced faculty and staff to handle these courses.Being a Government of Kerala undertaking college with a consistent and relatively good academic and placement record, the college is one of the most sought-after colleges in the Malabar region. review_summary.college_name: LBS College of Engineering Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: It has good infrastructure, good facilities for study, and good labs.

content.Placements: Half of the students get placed who clear all papers of B.Tech. The highest package is 10 LPA, and the lowest is 1.2 LPA. Infosys is the highest recruiting company. CS has many branches like business and AI. Many internship programs are provided in college.
content.Infrastructure: There is a very good atmosphere in college. It has good department with AC. It also provides Wi-Fi. We have a good library with study materials. There is a study hall for students. Hostel has good facilities with good food menu. Lots of non-veg food is available. Classrooms are well-maintained with good fans and light.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Good faculty support, active fests, and decent placements with scope for improvement.

content.Placements: In my CSE batch at LBS College of Engineering, around 70-80% students are placed. The highest package touched 17 LPA, while the lowest is about 3 LPA, with an average of 4 LPA - 5 LPA. Top recruiters included Infosys, TCS, Cognizant, Wipro, Capgemini, and EY. Nearly 60% of students got internships in companies like Infosys, TCS, and startups. The most offered roles are software engineer, data analyst, system engineer, and associate consultant, giving us strong exposure to the industry.
content.Infrastructure: CSE department has well-equipped labs, Wi-Fi, digital classrooms, a central library, and a fab lab, which help in both academic and project work. Hostels are decent with basic facilities, but food in the mess is average. There are sports grounds, medical support, and a canteen, making campus life manageable, though some facilities could be modernized.

individual_reviews.title: Good faculty, placements, really good infrastructure and facilities.

reviews.review_text: In my department for every class, there is a laptop, projectors, Wi-Fi for department and a library for each department. AC is also available in seminar halls in our department. The quality of food in the canteen is very good, with less money. There are medical facilities in college and sports and games are conducted each year.

reviews.review_heading: You should read this before joining LBS College of Engineering Kasargod.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure has improved very much lately. I am not saying that the previous one was outdated. They have improved it with Wi-Fi. The college has a library with the latest books. The food at the hostel is average. The canteen is superb, and the college does promote sports and extra curricular activities.

reviews.review_heading: Review of LBS College of Engineering.
reviews.review_text:
The classrooms don't have Wi-Fi facilities. The hostels don't have Wi-Fi facilities. The course fee for electronics and communication engineering is around 35,000 for a year. The classrooms and library are well maintained, and the library has enough books for students 
.

reviews.review_heading: Pretty average college, I would give it 3 out of 5.
reviews.review_text: The library provided has a large number of books to help you through your B.Tech. journey. Wi-Fi isn't provided for everyone. Some classrooms are well-equipped, while others are pretty average. For a hostel, it is pretty neat and affordable; the mess and menu are kind of average, but comparatively, they are okay. They don't provide many medical facilities. We have different fields for each sport, and they are pretty good.

reviews.review_heading: Poor placements nowadays, mid standard faculty, good sports participation, and cultural programs.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is pretty standard; all labs are available and working. The mechanical lab is really good and equipped with all the necessary machines. The class room has two ceiling fans, benches and desks, and a blackboard. The hostel for first-year students is outside the campus; it is a 15-minute walk under the scorching sun. Yes, it gets really sunny and humid here; sunscreen and an umbrella are vital. The food in the hostel is of high standards when compared to other gove...

reviews.review_heading: It is an excellent college.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college needs improvement. Wi-Fi was available throughout the campus, but not everyone had access. Labs and classrooms were good. The canteen was available in the college, and the food was good. Boy's and girl's hostels were available. The food at the girl's hostel was average. There were two playgrounds on campus. Sports was prioritized, and participation in university competitions was appreciated. Intercollege tournaments were held.

reviews.review_heading: Review of LBS College of Engineering.
reviews.review_text: Students have very neat classrooms and big library. Department and hostel facilities far more better than any other college with affordable fee. Mess food is average. The workshop and laboratories are also good. It has big mechanical workshop with great facilities.

reviews.review_heading: Really good infrastructure, faculty and atmosphere.
reviews.review_text: I think our college has the best labs and infrastructure. Almost every machinery is available for our future development. Good faculty and very good cad lab is there. Our hostel Life is different from other colleges because we have different hostels for different years students. Food is provided based on preference.

admission_overview.college_name: Nagaland University Admission 2025: Courses, Fee, Eligibility & Dates

admission_process.title: Nagaland University Dimapur Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: Nagaland University admission 2025is a central university having a presence through its four different campuses, one of which is Dimapur. Nagaland University Dimapur offers an AICTE-approved BTech programme at its School of Engineering & Technology. Nagaland University Dimapur's admission to the BTech programme is based on the merit list of theSchool of Engineering and Technology Entrance Examination (SETEE).The admission notice is issued by the Dean/ Admission Convener two months before the commencement of the academic year.Nagaland University Dimapuroffers various courses for candidates to choose from. Candidates are granted admission through Fresh Entry, Lateral Entry, All India open category, University quota and State quota.

Nagaland University Dimapur admission 2025 to its full-time BTech programme is completely merit-based. Candidates who meet the minimum eligibility criteria set by the University can apply to any of the five specialisations offered. The first-semester fee for the BTech course isINR 16,570.Generally, BTech is a four-year programme, but academically weak students who are not able to clear their BTech in the first attempt get a chance to complete their course within 12 consecutive semesters (six-year duration). During the Nagaland University Dimapur admission process, preference shall be awarded to candidates with a valid score in CBSEJEE Main/JEE Advanced. Some of the highlights related to Nagaland University Dimapur admission are presented below:
Download Nagaland University Dimapur Detailed Fee & Prospectus

Nagaland University offers various courses for interested candidates. The eligibility and selection criteria vary for different courses. Candidates must meet the eligibility criteria to participate in the admission process for Nagaland University. Candidates can learn more about the eligibility and selection criteria of the courses on offer through the table given below:

Nagaland University offers UG and PG courses for candidates. The fee structure is decided by the university, with various components included in the fee structure. The fee components can be refundable or non-refundable. The total number of seat-intake set by the university determines the total number of candidates that are going to get admission into the course. Check out the fee and seat table to learn more:
NOTE:The above-mentioned fee and seat intake are taken from the official website/sanctioning body. It is subject to changes and hence, is indicative.

Candidates can get into Nagaland University for the courses on offer in the admission process 2025 based on merit or entrance. Candidates are required to fill the application form, pay the application fee to register for the course and then appear for the required entrance test to make it to the final shortlist. Go through the steps below to learn more about the Nagaland University admission process 2025:
Step 1: Nagaland University Application Process 2025

Candidates wishing to apply for courses at Nagaland University must apply for their desired course through the online application form on the DOST portal. The link to the application form and to the portal can be found on the official website of Nagaland University.
Step 2: Paying the Application Fee

Candidates must fill in the application form and upload the necessary documents to be able to pay the application form fee. The application form fees for geenral category students isINR 500and for reserved category students is INR 300.
Step 3: Appearing for Entrance

Candidates must check the eligibility and selection criteria of the courses they wish to apply to. Candidates must appear for the entrance exam if that is required according to the selection criteria.
Step 4: Paying the Course Fee

Candidates who have made it to the final shortlist are eligible to pay the course fee they have applied to. Candidates can check the fee structure for the courses available at Nagaland University. Once the course fee is paid, candidates can start to attend the regular classes.

courses_data.name: Nagaland University BTech Admission 2025
eligibility: Accepting Exams:JEE Main, JEE Advanced, CUET
courses_data.description: At UG level, the University offers a four-year BTech programme comprising eight semesters. For Nagaland University Dimapur admission, it is mandatory for a candidate to passClass 12. Candidates who meet the minimum eligibility criteria set by Nagaland University with a valid score in JEE Main/MHT CET exam can apply. It also grants admission through theUniversity-quota. Nagaland University Dimapur admission is through Fresh Entry and Lateral Entry also. Candidates seeking admission to any Technology specialisation after Class 12, must secure a minimum aggregate of 50 per cent and 45 per cent for the General and SC/ ST categories, respectively. Additionally, they must pass Physics, Chemistry and Mathematics (PCM) in their Class 12 exam. However, those applying to BTech inBiotechnologymust have also passed Biology, along with PCM. Candidates seeking admission to BTech programme through Lateral Entry mode (after Diploma/ BSc) should have an aggregate of at least 50 per cent (General Category), which is 45 per cent for SC/ ST category. Find below some of the key highlights for the Nagaland University BE/BTech programme, such as the eligibility, fee and dates:

And every department has access to these facilities. And yes, the canteen is medium-sized with a lot of varieties of items, and there is a hostel for girls only. No idea about medical, yes, a basketball court, a volleyball ground, and some others too.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2024Offered by Dimapur Government CollegeReviewed on 26 Nov 2024)
reviews.review_heading: An honest review about DGC.
reviews.review_text: Some classrooms are small and not enough for all students to fit in. The Wi-Fi is not accessible to all students. The mess of the main hostel is quite good compared to other hostels. The hostel being within the campus is one of its advantages. The hostel is quite affordable compared to other hostels.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2027Offered by Dimapur Government CollegeReviewed on 5 Nov 2024)
reviews.review_heading: A review about my college DGC.
reviews.review_text: Some classrooms are small and it is quite difficult to fit a number of students inside them. The auditorium is also small to fit all the students. The hostel is quite good. The mess is good as compared to other hostels. Though there is no access to Wi-Fi, other than that, it is good.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2027Offered by Dimapur Government CollegeReviewed on 4 Nov 2024)
reviews.review_heading: Dimapur Government College review.
reviews.review_text: The facilities and infrastructure at Dimapur Government College are improving these days as some developments are taking place. The hostel is quite good and affordable, and the mess is also quite good as compared to other hostels. Wi-Fi is available at the college but it is not accessible to everyone.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2025Offered by Unity CollegeReviewed on 17 Oct 2024)
reviews.review_heading: College life with lots of memories.
reviews.review_text: The facilities available in our college are too good! We have a huge library with AC, we also have a wifi connection in the college, and we have computer labs where we can finish our vocational courses. The classrooms are also big enough!

reviews.batch: Batch of 2025Offered by Kohima Science CollegeReviewed on 4 Sep 2024)
reviews.review_heading: Good college with boring events.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is very average, and we don't know whether we can put the blame on it or not as it is a government college. The quality of facilities and infrastructure in our hostel is very poor, as it has been running since the establishment of the college, maybe since the 1980's.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2024Offered by Don Bosco CollegeReviewed on 29 Aug 2024)
reviews.review_heading: A proper place for learning with proper facilities and learning opportunities.
reviews.review_text: We have Wi-Fi 24 hours available all around the campus, as my college had multiple building blocks. There is a fully facilitated lab and gym too, with an affordable membership. The library has 24 hours Wi-Fi with the latest books for all papers. There are canteens in the building that are affordable, with proper medical services available, and we also have sports clubs and other artistic clubs.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2025Offered by Kohima Science CollegeReviewed on 6 Jul 2024)
reviews.review_heading: All you need to know about Kohima Science college, jotsoma.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure and facilities are quite good at the college; however, the infrastructure of the government hostels needs quite a renovation. Classrooms and libraries are well maintained. Wi-Fi is available in all departments. Folding in the hostel is really good.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2023Offered by Kohima Science CollegeReviewed on 2 Jul 2024)
reviews.review_heading: A brief review of Kohima Science College, Jotsoma. An honest review.
reviews.review_text: The overall experience could be better with the infrastructure. However, since my uncle studied here, the product the college produces is good, as now there are many big shots present. I hope the same legacy continues with the upcoming students.

reviews.review_heading: The campus is very nice, and the people are nice, but there is no campus life and no placement.
reviews.review_text: The hostel is enjoyable. The food is good, and the rooms are comfortable. There is an electricity problem, though. The seniors are very cooperative, and the hostel staff is also very friendly. We get chicken every alternate day. The hostel is near the main market, so it is easy to buy things.

reviews.review_heading: The college has overall good infrastructure, a good environment, and good fests.
reviews.review_text: Every facility is available. Every department has its own Wi-Fi. There is a big library where you can find all the books related to your course. There are 3 hostels for boys and 3 hostels for girls. Hostels are fully cleaned, and the mess fee is only 1700. The food quality is really good. Students get lots of opportunities in the field of sports and games.

highlights.summary: Doon Group of Institutions admissions 2026 are open for all the courses. Interested candidates can apply for their desired course through the official institute's website. A few more updates are as follows:

fees_and_eligibility.overview: Doon Group of Institutions offers various programmes at UG and PG levels. Students can choose Full Time courses from plethora of streams such as Engineering, Business & Management Studies and Accounting & Commerce. At the UG level, students can choose from courses, namely B.E. / B.Tech, B.Com and BBA. On the other hand, at the PG level, the Doon Group of Institutions offers M.E./M.Tech. The fees for Doon Group of Institutions courses range between INR 1,05,000 to 2,00,000.

faqs.answer: A:    Doon Group of Institutions offers Degree and Diploma courses including 7 UG and 1 PG courses. Additionally, it also has After 10th Diploma courses. These programs are offerred in Full Time mode. Doon Group of Institutions has specializations such as B.Tech specializations in Electronics & Communication Engineering, Electrical Engineering, Civil Engineering, Computer Science Engineering, Mechanical Engineering, M.E./M.Tech specializations in Computer Science Engineering, After 10th Diploma specializations in Automobile Engineering, Mechanical Engineering, Civil Engineering, Electrical Engineering.
faqs.question: What kind of specializations are available in courses offered at Doon Group of Institutions?

faqs.answer:
A:    Doon Group of Institutions has below criteria for taking admissions to it's various courses: CoursesEligibilityBBACandidate must have scored the mentioned aggregate in any stream.B.E. / B.TechCandidate must have passed in class 10+2 from a recognized board.B.ComCandidate must have passed in class 10+2 from a recognized board.M.E./M.TechCandidates are required to score 45% in case of belonging to reserved category.
Mentioned eligibility is for the candidates appearing for UKSEE.After 10th DiplomaCandidate passed 10th class/equivalent with atleast 35% marks from any recognized institute/board are eligible to apply.

reviews_list.review_title: Satisfied with campus and faculty members.

review_content.Placements: Placement of our college is always above average. Almost 70 percent of student in our batch got placed with different companies like Honda, Hero, Tech Mahindra etc. Every year many IT and Technical companies visit our campus for recruitment. College also offers some internship before final semester.
review_content.Infrastructure: Our college is private, so it has all the necessary facilities like proper classrooms, computer labs, canteen, ground etc. Campus is connected with Wi-Fi connectivity which is good. Hostel facilities is also very good with clean rooms. Food available in mess is good.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Business Administration (BBA) - Batch of 2017
reviews_list.review_title: The environment of college is good, and they provide a good education for students.

review_content.Placements: I scored 65% in academics. At our time, companies do not visit our campus for placements. I got disappointed about not getting a job after the course. I thought after graduation, I will get a job, but the college does not provide placements.
review_content.Infrastructure: Facilities available in our college are quite good. There are two computer labs, and both are huge. It provides two huge libraries, and mostly all books are available for students. The college provides free Wi-Fi facility, but the speed is not that much good. Quality of food served is great, and the mess is also good. Medical facilities available are great. Many sports events are organised at our college.

faqs.answer: The scope of MBA course is increasing day by day. MBA is one of the big job oriented professional programme and the most one which has been sought by the students. Once you have completed your degree, you have a great job opportunity in the industrial world. You may the manager or executive in term of designation.The management term is most suited to the managers and that's why it is the way, where you can reach on the top of the height as soon as possible by using your leadership and working proficiency. An MBA professional always plays a vital role in his/her company and this is why he used to keep in touch with the board of directors. No need to specify the companies who recruit the MBA professionals. All sectors including government and public have various industries, companies, institutions or related organizations, come in the job prospective fields for an MBA professional.Some job profiles are listed here:Brand ManagerAccount ManagerInternational Business ManagerMarketing ExecutiveBusiness Technical ConsultantAll the best.
faqs.question: Q: What is the scope of MBA?

faqs.answer: The BTech Mechanical Engineering syllabus is not the same across all colleges, as every college committee sets a particular coursework pattern at the start of every academic year to be followed for the respective batch. The syllabus includes some core subjects, interesting electives, and lab work that gives detailed knowledge to the students about the workings of the field.
faqs.question: Q: Is the BTech Mechanical Engineering syllabus the same for all colleges?

faqs.answer: Electrical Engineering professionals are engineering jack of all trades, as they make use of their knowledge of Physics and Mathematics along with computer programming skills to develop intricate circuit systems. These circuit boards run electrical signals to and from electrical components to accomplish everything from a mundane computer startup to controlling absolute power and precision of a rocket going out of earth's atmosphere.Know more about -Electrical Engineering Courses
faqs.question: Q: What do Electrical Engineering professionals do?

faqs.answer: The syllabus for the B Tech EE course focuses on both aspects because they are equally important for you to do well at the workplace in the future. There are theory classes to make you understand the meaning and workings of the Electrical Engineering concepts, and practical lab work and industrial training to give you a glimpse of the real-world applications.Know more about -Electrical Engineering Courses
faqs.question: Q: Does the BTech Electrical Engineering syllabus focus more on theory or practical application?

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Commerce (B.Com.) - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: The college is in the Dehradun city.

content.Placements: For placements, most students apply by their self through online employment agencies where they can recruit. The college also provides placements, but salary expectations are very low there. Mostly, students prefer outside the college campus for placements.
content.Infrastructure: The college has good classrooms, a library, and grounds. Overall, the infrastructure is good. Wi-Fi is not available for students, but it is available for teachers. It has a canteen where the food is of decent level. It also has sports facilities.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Business Administration (BBA) - Batch of 2019
individual_reviews.title: Best college with good infrastructure.

content.Placements: I would say, placement is really good in our college. Every year good companies visit our campus for selection of students. Almost 65 percent of student from our batch are placed with different companies at a good package. College also helps in finding internship in final year.
content.Infrastructure: It is one of the best college in Rishikesh-Haridwar region if we talk about infrastructure. It has all the necessary facilities like free Wi-Fi, cool campus, big ground for sports, computer rooms and labs and library. Hostel facilities arw good and have proper food.

Almost 70 percent of student in our batch got placed with different companies like Honda, Hero, Tech Mahindra etc. Every year many IT and Technical companies visit our campus for recruitment. College also offers some internship before final semester.
content.Infrastructure: Our college is private, so it has all the necessary facilities like proper classrooms, computer labs, canteen, ground etc. Campus is connected with Wi-Fi connectivity which is good. Hostel facilities is also very good with clean rooms. Food available in mess is good.

individual_reviews.title: The environment of college is good, and they provide a good education for students.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Commerce (B.Com.) - Batch of 2019
individual_reviews.title: It is the best college in Rishikesh.

content.Placements: There are no placements in our college. However, other things are well and good. If you are looking for a good graduate college, then Doon Group of Institutions is the best college. I recommend you join this college.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of Doon Group of Institutions is very good. There are 2 buildings in our college; one is for research and management, and the other one is for engineering and polytechnic. A hostel facility is also available for students who want to stay in a hostel.
content.Faculty: Faculty members in our college are very good. They can help you in every situation in our study and also other problems related to your fees, etc. The director of DIMR is also very helpful. They understand the problem of the students and solve it.

reviews.review_heading: It is the best college in Rishikesh.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of Doon Group of Institutions is very good. There are 2 buildings in our college; one is for research and management, and the other one is for engineering and polytechnic. A hostel facility is also available for students who want to stay in a hostel.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely dissatisfied with faculty. Good infrastructure and placements in 2018 were good.
reviews.review_text: Facilities provided by the college are very good. Wi-fi, Labs, classroom, and library are okay. But sports and games, medical facilities are not good and not available in our college. The quality of the labs and classrooms is very good. The quality of the food served in the canteen is very good. Hostel rooms are average. I didn't face any infrastructure related issues during my tenure at the college.

reviews.review_heading: It is a very good experience in our college.
reviews.review_text: The facilities provided by the college are very good. The labs are clean, and the medical facilities are available 24*7. The sports like cricket, football, basketball, soccer, swimming etc. are organised in the college. There are 80 rooms available in the college, and they are very clean. It is very comfortable in the college.

reviews.review_heading: The dream comes true in my campus.
reviews.review_text: 24*7 Wi-Fi is provided. Sports and games are available. The library, gym, canteens, hostel rooms, boys hostel, girls hostel, drawing halls, computer centre, workshop, are provided. A standby power generator is provided in the college to take care of occupational power shutdown. A technology adept the campus. This campus had a wireless computer system.

reviews.review_heading: Good number of students are joining every year.
reviews.review_text: The Wi-Fi facility is not available in my starting days but after Jio has launched the campus is full of good Wi-Fi. The labs are neat and clean but not all equipment available on the campus. The library is also good. In fact, the librarian sir is cool and helpful. The hostel rooms are neat and clean. The food is not good in the canteen.

reviews.review_heading: Almost dissatisfied with the zero mentoring facility and no genuine concern from the management.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi was provided only for the hostel students. The classrooms were good, syllabus books were provided to us, but extra study material in the library was not in bulk to satisfy the needs of all students. Not different healthy meals were there for the hostel students, quality was not appropriate. The hostels had good sanitation facilities and rooms were almost clean and dirt free. There were no infrastructure issues.

reviews.review_heading: It is an average engineering college.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is average. It has 2 blocks of academics and 2 hostels for boys and girls separately, they are one of the best things in the college. The canteen is better than many other colleges. A huge playground for cricket and football enthusiasts. However, it is a small campus which has a railway line inside it.

reviews.review_heading: Good infrastructure and helpful faculty.
reviews.review_text: A good infrastructure is available. Big, airy and clean classrooms are available. There are 4 computer labs, a fully equipped physics lab, a chemistry lab and a mechanical lab available. A good quality food is provided in the canteen. Hostel rooms were at a very good location and also very secure.

Faculty is up to the mark especially of mechanical department. Infrastructure is excellent. Good transportation as well as food facility is provided. Highly full flanged gym and sports pavilion, adorable net-lab, fully Wi-Fi at overall campus having full speed of 10 mbps. Every day starts with the holy prayer at our very green campus. Faculty is up to the mark especially of mechanical department. Infrastructure is excellent. Good transportation as well as food facility is provided. Highly full flanged gym and sports pavilion, adorable net-lab, fully Wi-Fi at overall campus having full speed of 10 mbps. Every day starts with the holy prayer at our very green campus.

reviews.review_heading: The dissatisfied about the college is some senior student behavior
reviews.review_text: Collage design is osam and we love structure and the ground is great you saw mountain around near by you. You grow your skill in this college and the change to go national. They give more change to you they not de motivate you.they give full support .

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied with the placements and faculty.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is average, not so good not so bad, but it can improve fulfilling the amount of fee paid here. The quality of food in the canteen is quite good. The computer lab is web equipped and the workshop for civil and mechanical filed are also well-equipped and all the practical knowledge is given in these labs.

fees_and_eligibility.overview: Overview not available

review_content.Placements: The placement of the course is available only for Computer Science and Electronics Engineering. The highest package of the course is a minimum of 15 LPA, and many students are placed outside my college. Many companies are coming and placing many students from this college.
review_content.Infrastructure: The hostels are only for girls, and boys live in rental rooms in Otur and Dumberwadi. There are many rooms in Otur and Dumberwadi. It has good quality food, and mess facilities are available in both Otur and Dumberwadi. There are sports in the college, and a game ground is available.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.E. in Electronics and Telecommunication Engineering - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: Review of Sharadchandra Pawar College of Engineering.

review_content.Placements: Placements are good, 70% of students get placed annually. Small technology companies approach the college for recruitment, the campus also has a placement cell. We can also go through walking interviews recommended by the college staff. The placements are impressive in our college.
review_content.Infrastructure: The campus does not have a boys' hostel. For girls, they have a hostel in Our, 3 km from the campus. For boys, they can live in private flats by paying rent. The drawback is that this does not come under college organisation, but you will get a quality life.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.E. in Computer and Science Engineering - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: Our college is so good for placement and other things.

review_content.Placements: The minimum package of our college is 3 LPA, and the highest package of our college is 5 LPA. Our college recruiting companies are Capgemini, Exceler, Qspyder, and others. Many companies provide us with internships for a period of 3 months, and the 6 months after the internship, companies select you for the permanent role.
review_content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi is available in the college, and the computer labs are also available. There are 4 to 5 labs in our college. In the library, many books are available for college students, and they take advantage of the library. Various books are available. Sports and games are also available.

The Institute offers the respective programmes for the duration of 4 years in affiliation with Anna University. JIT offers admission based on entrance scores/ merit. admission_process.title: Jansons Institute of Technology Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: Jansons Institute of Technologyadmission 2025is based on entrance exam scores/merit and TNEA counselling. The institute offers six courses at the UG level. However, the institute also offers PhD courses. To get admitted toJIT College, candidates must meet the eligibility criteria set by the institute. JIT College is affiliated withAnna University. The application process at JIT College is conducted online. Read the following article to learn more about admission to theJIT Collegecourse in2025.

Jansons Institute of Technology provides a variety of undergraduate programmes. Candidates must also fulfil the minimum eligibility requirements for the respective courses. The following table mentions the eligibility and selection for some of the popularJansons Institute of Technology courses:
Eligibility
Selection Criteria
Class 12 with a 45% aggregate
Merit +TNEAcounselling
Post Graduate
UGC NET,CSIR NET
Read More:JIT Brochure

Jansons Institute of Technology admissionsare primarily entrance-based. Candidates can fill up an admission enquiry form for admission. The admission process at Jansons Institute of Technology is as per the steps below:
STEP 1: Jansons Institute of Technology Application Process 2025
The mode of application is online. Candidates can fill up an admission enquiry form for admission.
STEP 2: Selection

Aspirants are selected based on merit + TNEA counselling for the BTech/BE course. Similarly, for PhD courses, candidates must have a valid entrance exam score, i.e., UGC NET, and CSIR NET. Candidates can fill out the application form on the university's official website.
STEP 3: Merit List & Admission Confirmation

After the release of theJansons Institute of Technology cutoff, aspirants with scores equal to or above the cutoff are offered seats. The university also releases a merit list based on the composite scores of the candidates for admission. Shortlisted aspirants need to come for document verification and pay theJansons Institute of Technology feeto confirm their seats in the university.

faqs.question: What is the eligibility for B.Tech admission at Jansons Institute of Technology?
faqs.answer: For admission in a BTech programme at Jansons Institute of Technology, it is crucial that the aspirant fulfills the course-specific eligibility criteria. Thus, only the asiprants who have passed Class 12 with at least 45% aggregate are eligible for admission. In addition, student should have passed the qualifying examination from a recognised board. Candidate must also hold the Class 12 mark sheet during application form filling and at the time of admission for verification purposes.

faqs.question: Is it easy to get admission to B.Tech at Jansons Institute of Technology?
faqs.answer: To get into Jansons Institute of Technology for a BTech course, candidates must meet the eligibility criteria set by the university. Jansons Institute of Technology offers full-time BTech courses of four years' duration. Students can get into this course based on a valid Class 12 with a 45% aggregate exam score. Apart from the selection criteria, students must pass Class 12 (common eligibility).

faqs.question: Are admissions open at Jansons Institute of Technology?
faqs.answer: Jansons Institute of Technology admission 2025 is basedon the entrance exam score.Candidates are selected for courses based on merit + TNEA counsellin or UGC NET, CSIR NET. Aspirants can apply online on the official website of the institute. The institute offers six courses at the UG level. However, the institute also offers PhD course. To get admitted to JIT College, candidates must meet the eligibility criteria set by the institute.

faqs.question: Can I get admission to various courses at Jansons Institute of Technology without appearing in any entrance exam?
faqs.answer: No, candidates cannot join Jansons Institute of Technology without an entrance exam for PhD course. However, the selection criteria for BTech course is based on merit + TNEA counselling. The institute offers six courses at the UG level. However, the institute also offers PhD course. To get admitted to JIT College, candidates must meet the eligibility criteria set by the institute. The application process at JIT College is conducted online.

reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is available. There is a library in the hostel. Our college provides luxurious facilities for students like cupboards, daily cleaning, food, etc. It also provides games, a canteen facility on campus, and a medical room is also available.

reviews.review_heading: Good hostel and infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: Hostel is the biggest showcase in our college. The hostel is very good, with very good infrastructure and facilities compared to other colleges. This is the best college hostel; the food is also very nice. Comparing to other colleges, our college hostel is far better.

reviews.review_heading: Good infrastructure college.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is pretty good. The faculty are friendly. We have separate labs and one common library. The hostel infrastructure is good, with separate washrooms for each room. Hostel food is okay.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Jansons Institute of Technology.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is good and peaceful. Classrooms with AC and Wi-Fi are there. Labs with high technical infrastructure. And the library contains a lot of books in many genres. Hostels are available with clean rooms and hygienic food. 24/7 medical facilities are available at the hostel.

reviews.review_heading: Holistic learning experience and good infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi and drinking water are available in both the hostel and college; the library infrastructure is good; and the laboratory is decent to learn in. Overall, the hostel is good and maintains a hygienic and good environment. Daily cleaning with chemicals is decent and good.

reviews.review_heading: Not good for placements and students’ skills improvement.
reviews.review_text: The campus has Wi-Fi and AC for all classrooms and labs. The hostel is good with a good infrastructure. The only good thing in this college is hostel. The food is comparatively good in Coimbatore. But now the hostel fee has increased for the new batches. The classrooms and hostel rooms are less. They are planning to extend both.

reviews.review_heading: Dissatisfied with studies and placements.
reviews.review_text: The facilities are okay but sometimes they don't know about your projects and reports so that worries the most. The classrooms are nice, they provide AC and soft chairs. Wi-Fi is disappointing in the hostel, it doesn't work. They didn’t give priority to sports.

reviews.review_heading: Holistic learning for JIT - CCR.
reviews.review_text: Hostel life at JIT was very comfortable and sophisticated. It craved me to be a better individual and gave me an opportunity to kick-start my life. The infrastructure was good, with the college providing central AC. Among all colleges in Tamil Nadu, only two provide AC, and mine is one of them.

reviews.review_heading: Hostel is disappointing.
reviews.review_text: For infrastructure, I can give a 5 out of 5, but the hostel for boys is very unhygienic. The food in the food court is fully Tamilnadu food, and there are no compromises in it. As for other hostels, the food is below average. Hot water is only available in the morning. All sports are available to play, and the gym is facilitated. Now, if we talk about the college course and department, the lecturers are very kind and helpful at all aspects. The study is very good, Wi-Fi is facilitated, and there...

college_info.college_name: Jansons Institute of Technology Scholarship Details

paragraphs: The fee range for the BTech programme at Jansons Institute of Technology is INR 2 lakh. The fee structure is sourced from unofficial sources, hence indicative. The fee might cover various academic expenses like tuition fees, laboratory charges, examination fees, library fees, and other relevant charges. It is important to note that the fee structure is subject to change, and candidates are advised to refer to the official website of the university for the latest and most accurate fee structure.

To avail of a management scholarship at Jansons Institute of Technology, i.e., AICTE Tuition Fee Waiver Scheme candidates must meet certain T&Cs of the college. Students can check the detailed eligibility below:
Sons and daughters of parents whose annual income is less than Rs. 4.50 Lacs from all sources shall only be eligible under this scheme.
All other fees except tuition fees will have to be paid by the candidate.
Beneficiary students admitted under the AICTE TFW scheme will not be allowed to change Institution/course under any circumstances.

faqs.question: How do I get admission to B.Com at Trinity Institute of Innovations in Professional Studies?
faqs.answer: Trinity Institute of Innovations in Professional Studies offers merit-based admission to BCom. To proceed with filling out the application form, candidates must visit the official website of college to fill out the form. In addition, to be eligible for course admission, candidates must be Class 12 pass with a 45% aggregate (40% for SC/ST). It will be easier to secure a seat by meeting the eligibility criteria and being shortlisted based on marks in the last qualifying exam.

faqs.question: What is the fee structure for B.Com at Trinity Institute of Innovations in Professional Studies?
faqs.answer: The college offers BCom with a tuition fee of INR 50,000 per year. The college charges various extra charges excluding tuition fees such as admission fees, registration fees, and other fees. Candidates who want admission to BCom can visit the website of Trinity Institute of Innovations in Professional Studies to register for admission.

faqs.question: What is the admission process for TIIPS Greater Noida?
faqs.answer: Trinity College admission is a multi-step process. Check below the admission steps:Step 1: Trinity College Application Process 2024:Applicants are required to fill up the online application form of Guru Gobind Singh Indraprastha University (GGSIPU), Delhi. Apart from this, aspirants need to apply online at the institute or download the registration form.Step 2: Selection Rounds:The college accepts national-level entrance exams like IPU CET, CUET, JEE Main, etc. for admission to specific courses.

faqs.question: Is the TIIPS Greater Noida application 2024 out?
faqs.answer: Yes, Trinity Institute of Innovations in Professional Studies 2024 applications are out. Students who meet the eligibility criteria can visit the institute official website to register and apply. The application deadline is not available as of now. Hence, it is advised to register and apply as soon as possible. Students shall ensure that they enter all the details correctly and carefully in the application.

faqs.question: How can I get admission to Trinity Institute of Innovations in Professional Studies?
faqs.answer: Trinity Institute of Innovations in Professional Studies offers merit-based admission to all UG courses. The candidates are required to fulfil the eligibility criteria to secure admission. The eligibility for admission to UG courses is to pass Class 12 with 40% aggregate from a recognised board. After filling out the eligibility criteria, candidates must apply online by visiting the college's official website.

faqs.question: What are the various courses offered at Trinity Institute of Innovations in Professional Studies?
faqs.answer: There is only UG courses offered by Trinity Institute of Innovations in Professional Studies in the field of Commerce, Computer Application and Business Administration. Candidates interested in applying for BBA, BCA and BCom are required to apply on the official website of the college. To apply for admission, candidates are required to pass Class 12 from a recognised with 45% aggregate.

faqs.question: What is the required percentage for admission to various courses at Trinity Institute of Innovations in Professional Studies?
faqs.answer: The college offers merit-based admission to UG courses. The college provides three programmes under UG level. Here’s a table explaining the percentage criteria of different programmes at Trinity Institute of Innovations in Professional Studies:CourseEligibilityBBAClass 12 from a recognised board with any stream from a recognised board with a minimum aggregate of 45% for General/OBC & 40% aggregate for SC/STBCAClass 12 from a recognised board with any stream from a recognised board with a minimum aggregate of 45% for General/OBC & 40% aggregate for SC/STBComClass 12 from a recognised board with any stream from a recognised board with a minimum aggregate of 45% for General/OBC & 40% aggregate for SC/ST

faqs.question: What can students do after JEE Main session 2 result?
faqs.answer: After JEE session 2 is completed, only those candidates who are aiming for IITs need to start preparing for JEE Advanced after clearing JEE Main. Those who are above the 98th percentile should start preparing for JEE Advanced as soon as possible. Those below this, between the 95th and 98th percentile, should focus on attempting more mock tests and previous year question papers so that they have a better chance of clearing JEE Advanced

hostel_campus.college_name: TIIPS Greater Noida Infrastructure Details & Reviews

reviews.review_heading: Our college is the best law college in Greater Noida.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure facilities are good, and the Wi-Fi is good. There are classrooms, a library, and good books available. The campus includes multiple branches, with water facilities, air conditioning, and a playground. An activity room is also provided, along with newspapers and magazines.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied because of the good placements, really good infrastructure, and facilities.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is good, with a lush green campus, centralized AC, and campus Wi-Fi. The latest PCs are provided for B.Tech and BCA students. The best equipment for labs, and sports meets and games are regularly held. There are good facilities for the hostel and travel. The campus is nice, with good infrastructure, and a clean, nice environment in the classrooms.

reviews.review_heading: I am absolutely dissatisfied because of strength in the college and there is no cleanliness.
reviews.review_text: Facilities are good. Classrooms are very untidy. There is no medical room in the college. It needs to develop the infrastructure. The canteen should be clean and should have a variety of food. Washrooms must be clean and should have a mirror in them for girls.

reviews.review_heading: We are satisfied with the college, and our college was made in 2019.
reviews.review_text: There are many facilities in our college, like Wi-Fi, a moot courtroom, and AC classrooms. There are two libraries in our college, including a personal law library. The college also has a canteen that provides great food. Transport facilities are also available.

reviews.review_heading: 100% of students get placed here.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is good with a lush green campus, centralized AC, and campus Wi-Fi. It provides the latest PCs for B.Tech and BCA students. It has the best equipment for labs. Sports meets and games are regularly held. There are good facilities for hostels and traveling. The food provided is good, with evening snacks in the hostel.

reviews.review_heading: The college is above average. It provides good opportunities to grow academically.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is average and not very good. There is not any kind of foundation for anything like working air-conditioned all the time. All labs are working fine, and all other basic amenities are good. There is just one drawback that the canteen is not so good.

reviews.review_heading: I am absolutely satisfied because of good placements, good infrastructure, and facilities, etc.
reviews.review_text: This college has a good and clean campus. Classrooms are fully AC. It has Wi-Fi, and labs are filled with sufficient equipment for every experiment. Washrooms are clean. There are very good quality chairs in classes. A hostel facility is also available here. Fests and competitive competitions also happen here, like hackathons, sports tournaments, dance competitions, etc.

reviews.review_heading: The infrastructure is good. All rooms are air-conditioned, and the water facilities are good.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is good, and all students easily get books from the library. Classrooms are clean and air-conditioned. Wi-Fi is available for all students. Water facilities are also available. The college environment is good. There is no ragging. The fee is affordable here.

reviews.review_heading: Great curriculum and academics.
reviews.review_text: We have no campus hostel but our college is working on this. From this session, they will provide hostel facility too. Infrastructure of my course is good. We have good labs and advanced equipments. We have libraries. There is also a moot court for B.A. LL.B. students.

reviews.review_heading: Very good college and I like all the facilities.
reviews.review_text: The facilities are very good. Wi-Fi is also available and fully central AC. Parking is also available. Branches are also comfortable in seating and all the toilets are neat and clean. Floor is also neat and clean. Water coolers are available on every floor to drink water.

reviews.review_heading: This college can be a good option for students if they are looking to study in greater Noida.
reviews.review_text: There is a very good infrastructure. Every facility is available there like water coolers, washrooms, a lift, etc. There is a computer lab, moot court, and library. Sports and game facilities are also available. There is a canteen on the campus.

reviews.review_heading: The placement is overall good. The college also guarantees that they provide placements.
reviews.review_text: Everything is available, like AC and Wi-Fi, which are always working. There is no hostel, but PGs are available near the college. The canteen is good, and other facilities like sports and medical are also good. The fests are amazing, and stalls are also available on campus during the fest time.

reviews.review_heading: Trinity Institute of Innovations is the best college and I would suggest to join in.
reviews.review_text: The facilities and infrastructure provided by the college were quite good, and the lab classroom was amazing and very comfortable. The library was good, and very good published books are provided by the library. Facilities of the canteen were good hygiene; food was provided, and it was at a reasonable price, so it was affordable for students, and the football field was amazing; we participated in sports also. So our all-over campus is amazing. Our college didn't have a hostel, so I don't know ab...

reviews.review_heading: 4 years here were totally bliss .
reviews.review_text: The college is fully air conditioned, and there is a good space for parking, a large seminar hall, and a two-storey library- one for books and other with computer systems. The classrooms and labs are spacious, and the entire college is supported with free Wi-Fi. The classrooms have both greenboards and whiteboards for smart classes.

reviews.review_heading: It is the best college for engineering.
reviews.review_text: There is a well-furnished library in our college. It has all books. Wi-Fi is available to students. All classrooms are well-furnished and air-conditioned. There is no hostel in our college. Our college provides medical facilities and sports equipment. Our canteen is not much good. Our college has practical labs and theory labs.

data.description: The Library at TIIPS, is a rich source of knowledge that not only caters to the programme specified but to the overall growth of the students. The library is fully air-conditioned. It has spacious reading room. There are 12 leading newspaper for students and faculties. A total number of 3500 books and 1015 of Reference books are present at the library. The library has subscriptions of 45 National level Journals and 18 International level Journals.

fees_and_eligibility.overview: NGF College of Engineering and Technology offers various programmes at UG and PG levels. Students can choose Full Time courses from plethora of streams such as Engineering, Business & Management Studies and IT & Software. At the UG level, students can choose from courses, namely B.E. / B.Tech, BCA and BBA. reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Electrical Engineering - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: I am dissatisfied because of placements and campus life is boring.

review_content.Placements: Placement possibilities are very less in this college. Only 10-20% of students might get placements from college otherwise students have to search for jobs and internships by themselves. Also for students who got placements, the highest package must be around 2-3 LPA. For electrical engineering, only a single company came for recruiting during the placement drive.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the college is below average. It is smaller than other colleges compared to other colleges of the same fee structure. Wi-Fi is included in fees as an internet fee, but the internet is provided to students on campus. But labs are pretty much better but the equipment must be upgraded and repaired. Sports teachers or DPs are supportive. Tournaments are held frequently over time.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Electrical Engineering - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: The college should provide good companies in our college for recruitment.

review_content.Placements: Students who score a minimum of 70 marks in academics get placed. The salary package offered is overall 1 lakh for 6 months. Industries notice if students work hard or not when they work hard they will maximise the salary of students. Industries test the students.
review_content.Infrastructure: The hostel is good. The canteen is not good, and the quality of serving food is very bad. Wi-Fi is not worth it. Labs are good but some labs are very old. The library is so good. The librarian is very humble and good in nature. The park is so good because there is so much neat and clean grass there.

content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi facility is not available on the campus. Classrooms are maintained, but they charge a high money for attendance. The hostel facilities are not much good, and the food quality in the mess and canteen is not good, with charges high prices. The medical facilities are available in the college.

individual_reviews.course: BBA in Digital Marketing - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: The worst decision of my life was to take admission in this college.

content.Placements: On average, only 15-20% of students get placed, and they leave their jobs after a few months. The highest package is around 6-7 LPA. Very few students get that much package. The lowest is around 2-3 LPA. I don't know much about the companies, but all of them are from nearby. Around 40-50% of students get internships in nearby companies. Generally, we get jobs in sales, marketing, and supply chain management.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is not so good. The front side of the building looks good, but the back side doesn't match the outside. There is no access to Wi-Fi or labs and nearly no classes. The library is almost full of old books. The canteen is the worst part of this college always, dirty with sticky benches, and expired food is sold. They do not take expired food back once it is opened. Sports facilities are zero, and there is no equipment.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electrical Engineering - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: I am dissatisfied because of placements and campus life is boring.

content.Placements: Placement possibilities are very less in this college. Only 10-20% of students might get placements from college otherwise students have to search for jobs and internships by themselves. Also for students who got placements, the highest package must be around 2-3 LPA. For electrical engineering, only a single company came for recruiting during the placement drive.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the college is below average. It is smaller than other colleges compared to other colleges of the same fee structure. Wi-Fi is included in fees as an internet fee, but the internet is provided to students on campus. But labs are pretty much better but the equipment must be upgraded and repaired. Sports teachers or DPs are supportive. Tournaments are held frequently over time.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electrical Engineering - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: The college should provide good companies in our college for recruitment.

content.Placements: Students who score a minimum of 70 marks in academics get placed. The salary package offered is overall 1 lakh for 6 months. Industries notice if students work hard or not when they work hard they will maximise the salary of students. Industries test the students.
content.Infrastructure: The hostel is good. The canteen is not good, and the quality of serving food is very bad. Wi-Fi is not worth it. Labs are good but some labs are very old. The library is so good. The librarian is very humble and good in nature. The park is so good because there is so much neat and clean grass there.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Absolutely dissatisfied with the college faculty, labs, and placements.

content.Placements: This year, only 11 companies came for placement, and all the companies were only for sales. All companies came from Palwal and Faridabad; no one came from Delhi, Gurugram, or any software company. The highest package is around 2.5 to 3 LPA.
content.Infrastructure: I am a student of B.Tech CSE, and in the lab, most of the computers are outdated. Even these software don't support VS Code, and some computers are not working properly. Even after repeated complaints to the faculty, there is no response. The college provides full Wi-Fi across the campus, but you can only use 25 MB per day if you are lucky. About the library, only older-generation books are available.

hostel_campus.college_name: NGF College of Engineering and Technology Infrastructure Details & Reviews

hostel.description: The hostel has separate wings for boys and girls. The hostel rooms are spacious, airy, well lighted and fully furnished. All basic amenities are provided including a 24 hrs electricity supply, clean water and indoor as well as outdoor creation facilities.

library.description: NGF College of Engineering & Technology has centrally air conditioned computerized library which is well equipped with 28930 books which are stacked under 4971 titles covering each and every aspect of engineering, technology and management. The library also subscribes to more than 106 national and 42 international journals and periodicals. The  library is member of DELNET (Development Library Network Membership), CSI (Computer Society of India), ICC (Indian Cryogenics Council) and ILA (Indian Library Association).

sports.description: Available Facilities: Badminton Court, Basketball Court, Cricket Ground, Football Ground, Squash Court, Tennis Court, Table Tennis Court, Volleyball Ground, Billiards Table, Shooting Range, Athletic Tracks, Golf

reviews.review_heading: The college should provide good companies in our college for recruitment.

The librarian is very humble and good in nature. The park is so good because there is so much neat and clean grass there.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely dissatisfied with the college faculty, labs, and placements.

Even after repeated complaints to the faculty, there is no response. The college provides full Wi-Fi across the campus, but you can only use 25 MB per day if you are lucky. About the library, only older-generation books are available.

reviews.review_heading: Our college provides a great platform for you.
reviews.review_text: The facilities and infrastructure arefabolus. All facility members are available at all times. The hostel facilities are divided into girls hostels and boy hostels. For food mess and canteen are available with all types of food are available veg and non-veg, etc.

reviews.review_heading: This college can't give you college experience.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is good. The college spreads over 27 hectares of land but feels boring after some time. The Wi-Fi is so bad that you can't even text anyone. Labs are quite good and well maintained, but they don't allow students to use the labs in their free time. Hostel is good according to the fee they charge. The mess is also good, but the college canteen is very bad. The stuff here has no taste. It just feels that I wasted my money every time when I eat from the college canteen.

reviews.review_heading: Not completely satisfied with the college.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is not as good as it should be but not so bad that students can not learn anything interesting, and cooperative students definitely can study here. The library of this college is quite good and there is always a rush in the canteen.

reviews.review_heading: I would recommend not to take admission in this college.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of this campus is not in good condition. The facility is also not good. The campus have Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, library, canteen, and stationary. The facility of hostel is above average. The hostel rooms have AC rooms and non AC rooms.

reviews.review_heading: Faculty is the main problem and also placements arecnot satisfactory.
reviews.review_text: There is no wireless fidelity for students and labs also have poor infrastructure whereas library is satisfactory and classroom are also average. I am at the last year of my college and I didn't SEE any sports activity whereas food is quite good in the canteen and I didn't know about medical facilities.

reviews.review_heading: Dissatisfied with my college because it lacks good faculty.
reviews.review_text: From my perspective, the infrastructure is below average. Labs and classrooms are averagely maintained, and Wi-Fi is not available in all the labs. Additionally, a significant number of computer systems do not function properly. The quality of food in the mess is average, and the sports facilities in our college are below par.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely dissatisfied with the faculty.
reviews.review_text: The faculty is not that good. Below-average infrastructure. Wi-Fi is not available in every classroom; only specific rooms are arranged with Wi-Fi facilities. Labs are not that developed. The library is quite good. Classrooms are big enough to hold like 100 students.

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied with the faculty and good placements in 2021.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is not available for all students; labs are available for all students; classrooms are also available for all students; the library is also free and available for all students; and in the library, all types of books that refer to different departments are available.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely dissatisfied because this college has no placement and no facilities.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is not available in this college, and the internet connectivity is very poor. Labs are available in different branches. The hostel's facilities are standard, such as a common room with no extra amenities for guests, and the food quality is average.

reviews.review_heading: It is the best college for students.
reviews.review_text: There are so many facilities and infrastructure available for our course. There is a good Wi-Fi network and many labs. Different subjects have different labs. Library is also very good. Sports facility is also available. Medical facilities are also available.

review_content.Placements: Placements in our college are excellent. The top companies of Surat and other areas have been listed in the placement process. The summer internship and winter internship are also provided with campus placement. The package of the companies is around 3 to 6 LPA.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the college is eco-friendly. The campus is surrounded by trees, which gives it fresh air. There are other facilities like Wi-Fi, spacious classrooms, labs with air conditioning, and working computers. The food in the canteen is delicious.

reviews_list.review_title: The college I always wished for my bright future.
