Students can opt these programs to pursue their career in Teaching & Education, IT & Software, Engineering. Institute has trained & experienced faculty who deliver these programs. R.N.G. Patel Institute of Technology has a review rating of 3.6 on the basis of reviews by students. In addition to this, it has been rated 3.3 on campuslife, 2.6 on placements, 4.3 on faculty and 3.9 on Infrastructure.

review_summary.college_name: R.N.G. Patel Institute of Technology Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Information Technology - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: Our college is the best under GTU.

content.Placements: Almost 80% of students get placed for jobs. The highest salary package offered is around 5 LPA - 8 LPA. The lowest salary package offered is 2 LPA. Our college schedules industrial visits sometimes for practical knowledge. They conduct online meetings for expert sessions. Overall, they provide the best jobs with the highest packages.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our hostel is average, but the infrastructure of our college is very calm. Wi-Fi is average, but computer labs and the library are very modern. Our classrooms are very clean. The mess and canteen food are healthy and hygienic.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Chemical Engineering - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: Review of R.N.G. Patel Institute of Technology.

content.Placements: Students should score 9 CGPA for placements. The top recruiting companies are Meghmani, Reliance, Colourtex Industries, and many more that visit our college to recruit students. Junior engineer post is provided, and packages are different based on companies.
content.Infrastructure: Our college infrastructure is good, specifically for laboratories, lecture classes, and cricket grounds. According to this course, all kinds of equipment are available in the laboratory. For lectures, projectors are installed for some specific subjects. Wi-Fi is also enabled, and connectivity is very good.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: Our college has a better education system in computer science and engineering.

content.Placements: Placements in our college are excellent. The top companies of Surat and other areas have been listed in the placement process. The summer internship and winter internship are also provided with campus placement. The package of the companies is around 3 to 6 LPA.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the college is eco-friendly. The campus is surrounded by trees, which gives it fresh air. There are other facilities like Wi-Fi, spacious classrooms, labs with air conditioning, and working computers. The food in the canteen is delicious.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2017
individual_reviews.title: The college I always wished for my bright future.

content.Placements: We had an amazing year and 13 students got placed in big firms with a 4 Lacs per annum package and had companies that were all big shots. They showed us real-world things and certainly also asked us something which was all myths for us. Also we had a clarity about how actually the thing works and what exactly does the industry demands.
content.Infrastructure: Our college had all the top-notch services that allowed the students to have the best exploring experience and so the infrastructure was too well defined according to the need. It was all up to date. We had a fun experience in every aspect, we could interact with all faculty members with ease. Also, the Wi-Fi and other services were up to date so that students can have all the best things and information available to them.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2021
individual_reviews.title: Good placements in 2016, really good infrastructure and facilities.

content.Placements: 10 percent of students were placed in your course. 4 lakh was the highest,1.20 lakh the lowest and 2.00 lakh the average package offered in our course. Top Recruiting companies are reliance, Sterlite power transmission limited. 10 percent of students got internship from mechanical engineering.
content.Infrastructure: The facilities and infrastructure available for in mechanical department course are differenttypesof Labs with full instruments, good library facility, the quality of food available in the mess and canteen is very good and price of food is reasonable.

reviews.review_heading: The college I always wished for my bright future.

It was all up to date. We had a fun experience in every aspect, we could interact with all faculty members with ease. reviews.review_heading: Good placements in 2016, really good infrastructure and facilities.
reviews.review_text: The facilities and infrastructure available for in mechanical department course are differenttypesof Labs with full instruments, good library facility, the quality of food available in the mess and canteen is very good and price of food is reasonable.

reviews.review_heading: Review of R.N.G. Patel Institute of Technology.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is good. Laboratories and classrooms are equipped with the required facilities. There is no Wi-Fi facility for students, and even there is always network issue in college. The hostel rooms are clean. The food served is also good in the canteen. There are no proper medical facilities on campus.

reviews.review_heading: Our management only focuses on academic activities.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is good. All labs and classrooms are equipped with better facilities. There is no Wi-Fi facility for students, and even there is always network issue in the whole college. The hostel rooms are huge. The food served is also good in a mess and canteen. There are no proper medical facilities. There is no proper arrangement of sports and games activities.

reviews.review_heading: One of the best college in Bardoli. The environment is very nice.
reviews.review_text: The college infrastructure is very good. It has a big campus and is also beautifully maintained. All the facilities are available. Classrooms and labs are all well maintained. The hostels are very nice. They are neat and clean. Small hostel so they can take good care of all students.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with the faculty and facilities provided with the college.
reviews.review_text: The college is huge. The college provides Wi-Fi facility, but only for Jio users. Labs are quite good. Classrooms are huge and airy. The college provides projectors in some classrooms. The library has full books, and it has a large space. The food served in the hostel canteen is not so tasty, but the food quality is good. Medical facilities are very good. Sports and games have a large variety like cricket, chess, etc.

reviews.review_heading: I am dissatisfied with placements in 2019 and satisfied with good infrastructure and facilities.
reviews.review_text:
1. There are very good facilities available in our college. There are different labs for different subjects like Refrigeration lab, HMT lab, CAD/CAM lab, and separate labs for different branches and there are good classrooms as well as library.
2. Hostel quality is Average and quality of canteen food is good and medical facilities also good as well as there is big ground for sports and games.

reviews.review_heading: This college is good for studying.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is not available in the hostels. The college has good labs. Mess food is hygienic and tasty. A maximum of 6 students stay in one room. Lockers and beds are provided by the hostel staff. In the winter season, hot water comes from the taps.

reviews.review_heading: All the facilities provided in our college are moderate.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi provided is not good. Labs are good, but classrooms are not air-conditioned. Library is good but not air-conditioned. Development of our college is moderate.

reviews.review_heading: In this college, professors are knowledgeable but the connection for placements is not good.
reviews.review_text: In this college, Wi-Fi was not available, but the laboratories were good. The classroom and library were also good in this college. The hostel was good.

reviews.review_heading: My college have very good campus.
reviews.review_text: Our college is placed at isroli-afwa, Bartoli, Surat. In our college, we have a so great infrastructure. Our college is a little bit far from the city. But outside our college, there are so many farms and a highway too. In our college, there is a big campus. There is a very large place for parking. There are mainly 5 coerces on our college. There is an admin office in our college. Two auditoriums for some events or webinars. There is very large ground in our college for sports. In our college, t...

reviews.review_heading: College with no placement offers in civil engineering department.
reviews.review_text: The campus is good i.e. new construction not older than 6-7 years and the best thing I like is that's it's very clean. The library is good but not as expected because the library is a bit noisy. There is no Wi-Fi for students. The civil engineering lab is good as they have all the instruments required. The most annoying thing about this college is that it did not have any good playground and did not even encourage sports.

faqs.question: What is the overall intake at JB Knowledge Park for all courses together?

faqs.answer:
A:    JB Knowledge Park has below criteria for taking admissions to it's various courses: CoursesEligibilityBBACandidate must have passed 10+2 from any government recognized board.BCACandidate must have passed Three years Diploma Program conducted by the State Board of Technical Education or any other examination recognized by the State Board of Technical Education as equivalent thereto.B.E. / B.TechCandidate must have passed 10+2 examination from recognized Board/University with Physics and Mathematics as compulsory subjects along with one of the following subjects: Chemistry/Bio-Technology/Biology/Technical Vocational subject/Computer Science/Information Technology/Informatics Practices/Agriculture/Engineering Graphics/Business Studies. 
Candidate must have obtained at least 45% marks (40% in case of candidate belonging to reserved category) in the above subjects taken together.

OR 

Candidate must have passed Diploma (in Engineering and Technology) examination with at least 45% marks (40% in case of candidates belonging to reserved category).

reviews_list.review_title: Honest review of JB Knowledge Park.

review_content.Placements: Around 60-70% of students will get placed in our course because at this time the IT field competition will be high. The highest package offered in our course ranges from 10-20 LPA, and the lowest package is around 2.5 LPA. We have collaborations with Sony, TCL, and other top recruiting companies. Only 5-10% of students got internships from our course.
review_content.Infrastructure: Facilites and infrastructure in our course are good. Our college has AC classrooms, Wi-Fi, and AC computer labs. The quality of the facilities in our hostel is good. Our college has AC hostels and good food is available in the mess. We have a canteen and the canteen food is not so good. Our college has sports and games facilities like a swimming pool, basketball court, badminton court, etc.

college_info.intro:
The flagship programmes offered at MPU University Bhopal are BSc, BTech, and MBA. The University provides these programmes to students at the UG and PG levels. Madhyanchal Professional University offers specialisations in Engineering and Technology, Medical and Paramedical Sciences, Agriculture Sciences and Technology, Education, Nursing, Sciences and IT, Management and Commerce, etc.
The University offers UG, PG and Diploma level programmes in full-time mode for the duration of 1 year to 4 years. The MPU University Bhopal admission process is through merit and entrance. MPU Bhopal courses strive to enhance the learning experience of students to prepare them for the industry. Candidates can check the popular programmes offered at Madhyanchal Professional University, Bhopal, in the table provided below:

placements.overview:
Madhyanchal Professional University Bhopal admission 2025 to UG, PG and Doctoral programmes is both merit and entrance-based, followed by a counselling round. The University conducts MPUPET for admission to PhD courses. MPU Bhopal also accepts scores in national-level entrance exams such as JEE Main, UGC-NET, CSIR-NET, etc., for admission to specific courses.

Candidates willing to get admission must meet the minimum eligibility criteria. To get admission to the MBA programme, candidates must have a minimum aggregate of 50% in their undergraduate degree (45% in case of candidates belonging to the reserved category, i.e. SC/ ST/ OBC category). The mode of application of Madhyanchal Professional University is both online and offline. The documents that shall be kept ready for the application process are:

review_content.Infrastructure: Excellent infrastructure; the canteen facility is excellent as well. There is a library, auditorium, temple, playground, and 7 buildings of 3 floors each. reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science Engineering - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: The truth of the low-grade college.

review_content.Placements: As we all know, the CSE branch is famous, and the seats get filled easily, even in a low-grade college like this one. Almost every company needs a CSE graduation for various purposes, but the top recruiting company is TCS (Tata Consultancy Services). The highest package in CSE courses can be as much as 1 crore if someone has graduated from IITs, NITs or some other prestigious college or university. Even someone who graduated from a low-grade college but has some above-basic knowledge in the domain of web development, software development or some other coding knowledge can get a lower package. The internship depends on the students. If some students have basic knowledge of coding and have completed their DSA, they can apply for internships at various companies, like Google and others, and they can also work on open-source projects to gain real-life work experience.

Top roles in this course are network administrator, full-stack developer, web developer, and app developer.
review_content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi is not available in this institution. Labs are available, so you can practice on a laptop or PC in the lab. The library is available. They give us books for 6 months. After that, we return to these books. We play volleyball, cricket, and kabaddi.

answer.text: The answer to this question depends on the course applied by the candidate. Madhyanchal Professional University conducts MPUPET for admission to PhD programmes. Besides, the university also accepts national-level entrance exams such as JEE Main for BTech and UGC-NET, CSIR-NET, SLET or GATE for PhD courses. The university releases a merit list to announce the names of the shortlisted candidates.

answer.text: Madhyanchal Professional University offers admission to most of the courses based on the qualifying exam scores of the candidates. The university accepts JEE Main for BTech and UGC-NET, CSIR-NET, etc. for admission to PhD programmes. Besides, the university also conducts MPUPET for admission to PhD. Once the entrance exam results are out, the university releases a merit list to announce the names of the selected candidates. Further, shortlisted aspirants need to report at the campus for document verification and fee payment.

faqs.question: How can I get admission in Madhyanchal Professional University?

answer.text: Yes, Madhyanchal Professional University considers JEE Main scores for admission to BTech course. Aspirants need to submit their score when filling out the application form. Besides, aspirants must also fulfil the eligibility requirements for admission. Candidates who have completed Class 12 with at least 45% aggregate with (40% aggregate for SC/ ST) Physics, Chemistry & Mathematics as compulsory subjects can get admission in the BTech programme.

college_info.college_name: Madhyanchal Professional University Fees 2026

fees_overview.description: Students getting admitted in any of the programme of Madhyanchal Professional University must pay fees for admission into the programme. The fee structure at Madhyanchal Professional University is bifurcated into various components, namely tuition, security deposit, and hostel fee. Certain fee elements are one-time payments to be made at the time of Madhyanchal Professional University admission, whereas others are recurring as per the norms of the institution fee policy. The fees vary anywhere between INR 18,000 - 12,00,000 depending upon the course chosen. Below is a table comprising the fee structure for different programs available at Madhyanchal Professional University.

overview_faqs.question: How costly is MPU Bhopal?
overview_faqs.answer: MPU Bhopal fee structure varies from course to course, depending on the level and duration of it. Candidates can request for a prospectus from the University or can check out the official website to procure the same. However, the MPU Bhopal fee structure involves tuition fees, development fees and various other one-time fee components that are to be paid as per the Unviersity guidlines. Although, to conclude, the University has an average fee structure that makes it accessible to the masses.

overview_faqs.question: How is the safety and security of the students living in the campus of MPU Bhopal?
overview_faqs.answer: MPU Bhopal campus has 24/7 security surveillance along with various committees to maintain the prestige and security at the campus. The University has Anti Ragging Cell, Discipline Committee, SC, ST Committee, Value and Ethics Development Cell and a portal to report for any kind of student grievance. MPU Bhopal has staff and senior faculty members within the committees to maintain the decorum of the campus.

overview_faqs.question: What is the fees for various courses at Madhyanchal Professional University ?
overview_faqs.answer: Candidates who are selected for admission need to pay the course fee as per the frequency set by the university. The fee varies with the course and specialisation selected by the candidates. Below is the total annual fee for MPU Bhopal popular courses:CourseTotal Annual FeeBTechINR 1.20 lakh - INR 2.60 lakhMBAINR 60,000 (As per MOU for some of the specialisations)MTechINR 50,000BBAINR 54,000BComINR 54,000

overview_faqs.question: Does the MPU Bhopal's location offer any tourist attraction around the campus?
overview_faqs.answer: MPU Bhopal is located amidst the greens of Ratibad, Bhopal district. The University is located on the Bhopal-Sehore by-pass road and is well connected by air and rail. The University is originally located within the serene peace of hills and lake. However, all the tourist attractions are a few kms away and with easily access to commute.

review_summary.college_name: Madhyanchal Professional University Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharm.) - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Excellent faculty and facilities, but disappointing placements.

content.Placements: There are many companies that hire students in bulk by giving them a stipend of 3-5 lacs per annum. About 5–10% of the students get hired because of the lack of jobs and their proficiency. 1.8 LPA is the lowest and 8 LPA is the highest package ever in my college. Cipla, Lupin, and TCS are some of the recruiting companies that come for placement. Above 70% of the students in my batch have completed internships at FDA, Bhopal. We can run a shop, join a MNC, prepare for government jobs, join the army as sepoy pharmacists, pass a government job like RRB and serve as railway pharmacists.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Average college with worst management and worst placement rate this year. Infrastructure is everage.

content.Placements: The placement in my college is really poor. Only 3 to 4 students get placed this year. As for the highest package, 10 LPA is the highest package in our college, but it is the package of the 2021 batch, and the average package is 2.5 LPA. There are no internships.
content.Infrastructure: The labs are not good at all, and some computers in our lab do not even work. There is no hostel. The food in the canteen is pretty good, but the price is a little bit high. There is also a basketball court and a volleyball court. There is also a massive cricket field.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Arts (B.A.) - Batch of 2021
individual_reviews.title: Satisfied with the faculty members but dissatisfied by the colleges fake scenarios.

content.Placements: In the Arts department, there are no placements, but some companies recruit students for multitasking roles. During my time, there were no placements. However, after completing my course, the college offered interviews with many companies. However, those companies were not related to our fields, so it all depends on whether you are interested or not.
content.Infrastructure: Excellent infrastructure; the canteen facility is excellent as well. There is a library, auditorium, temple, playground, and 7 buildings of 3 floors each. Overall, the infrastructure is satisfactory. The medical center is located in the nursing building. The auditorium is very large, with a minimum seating capacity of 100.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science Engineering - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: The truth of the low-grade college.

content.Placements: As we all know, the CSE branch is famous, and the seats get filled easily, even in a low-grade college like this one. Almost every company needs a CSE graduation for various purposes, but the top recruiting company is TCS (Tata Consultancy Services). The highest package in CSE courses can be as much as 1 crore if someone has graduated from IITs, NITs or some other prestigious college or university. Even someone who graduated from a low-grade college but has some above-basic knowledge in the domain of web development, software development or some other coding knowledge can get a lower package. The internship depends on the students. If some students have basic knowledge of coding and have completed their DSA, they can apply for internships at various companies, like Google and others, and they can also work on open-source projects to gain real-life work experience.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Computer Applications (BCA) - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: I am absolutely dissatisfied because of faculty.

content.Placements: Around 3 to 10 students were placed with 2 LPA to 4 LPA. Top recruiting companies are Byjus, Infosys, and Oracle. The highest salary package is around 10 LPA, and the lowest is 2 LPA. There are no internships provided at this university. Top roles in this course are network administrator, full-stack developer, web developer, and app developer.
content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi is not available in this institution. Labs are available, so you can practice on a laptop or PC in the lab. The library is available. They give us books for 6 months. After that, we return to these books. We play volleyball, cricket, and kabaddi.

admission_overview.college_name: Madhyanchal Professional University Admission 2025: Fees, Eligibility, Application & Selection

admission_process.title: MPU Bhopal Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: MPU Bhopal admission 2025is both merit and entrance-based. The university conductsMPUPETfor admission to PhD courses.MPU Bhopalalso accepts scores in national-level entrance exams such as JEE Main, UGC-NET, CSIR-NET, etc., for admission to specific courses. The university offers more than 25 courses at UG, PG and doctoral levels across various streams such as Engineering, Management, Commerce, Science, etc. Interested candidates can apply online or offline for admission.

The university offers courses in full-time offline mode. Candidates can fill out the application form online or visit the university for the same. Below are the key highlights related toMPU Bhopal admissions:
Particulars
MPU Bhopal Admission Highlights 2025
Mode of study
Programmes Offered
Admission status 2025
How to apply?
https://mpu.ac.in/
Level of programmes offered
Popular programmes

Admission to Madhyanchal Professional University is based on a qualifying exam or entrance test scores. The university may conduct MPUCET for admission to UG and PG courses. Candidates must also fulfil the minimum eligibility requirements of the respective courses to apply for admission. The basic eligibility for UG courses is Class 12 and graduation is required for PG programmes. Below are popularMPU Bhopal coursesalong with their eligibility and selection criteria:
Course Name

Selection Criteria

Note:Candidates applying for UG or PG courses may also need to appear for MPUCET conducted by the university. Reach out to the university for more information on this.
Steps for MPU Bhopal Admission Process 2025

Admissions are currently open at MPU Bhopal. Candidates fulfilling the eligibility requirements can apply for admission. The university shortlists candidates for admission based on their score in the qualifying exam or entrance test. Below are the steps to get a seat in the university:
STEP 1: MPU Application Process 2025

Candidates are required to apply online on the official website of the institute. However, aspirants looking for offline applications must visit the campus. Aspirants have to pay an application fee to apply for admission.
STEP 2: Selection Rounds

The university shortlists candidates for admission based on their merit in the last qualifying exam for most of the courses. MPU accepts JEE Main for BTech and UGC-NET/ CSIR-NET/ SLET/ GATE for PhD admission. The university conducts MPUPET for selecting candidates for PhD programme. The university may also conduct MPUCET for admission to UG and PG courses.
STEP 3: Merit List andAdmission Confirmation
Once selection rounds are over, the institute releases a merit list. To allot and confirm the seat, candidates are required to pay theMPU Bhopal feeat the time of admission.

courses_data.description: MPU Bhopal offers a four-year BTech course at the UG level through the School of Engineering. The university offers BTech in various specialisations such asComputer Science, Mechanical,Civil, Mining,Electrical, etc. Candidates who have passed Class 12 with Physics,Chemistryand Mathematics as compulsory subjects with a minimum of 45% aggregate are eligible to apply for any of the BTech specialisations. Besides, the university also offers lateral entry to BTech courses.

faqs.question: Who is eligible for BTech admission at MPU Bhopal?
faqs.answer: Candidates must pass Class 12 with at least 45% aggregate with (40% aggregate for SC/ ST) Physics, Chemistry & Mathematics as compulsory subjects to apply for BTech programme at Madhyanchal Professional University. Aspirants must hold the documents proving their eligibility for verification at the time of admission.

faqs.question: What is the seat intake for BTech at Madhyanchal Professional University?
faqs.answer: There are a total of690 seatsavailable in the BTech course of Madhyanchal Professional University. courses_data.name: MPU Bhopal MBA Admission 2025
courses_data.description: Madhyanchal Professional Universityoffers a two-year MBA programme at the PG level. The university offers MBA inAgri Business Management, Rural Management, Hospital Administration,IT,Banking Insurance, Retail Management and Entrepreneurship. Candidates who have passed a bachelor's degree or equivalent in the relevant field with at least 50% aggregate (45% aggregate for SC/ ST /OBC) are eligible to apply for the MBA programme.

faqs.question: How can I get admission in MBA at Madhyanchal Professional University?
faqs.answer: Madhyanchal Professional University admission to MBA programme is based on merit of the aspirants in the last qualifying exam. Candidates are required to complete their graduation or equivalent in the relevant discipline with at least 50% aggregate (45% aggregate for SC/ ST /OBC) to apply for MBA. Candidates who are selected for admission are required to pay the MBA fee to confirm their seat.

courses_data.name: MPU Bhopal MTech Admission 2025
courses_data.description: MPU Bhopal offers MTech for two years at the PG level. School of Engineering under MPU offers MTech in various specialisations such as Thermal Engineering,Computer Science,Structure Engineering,Digital Communication, etc. Admission to the MTech course is based on merit of the aspirants in the last qualifying exam. Candidates who have completed graduation in relevant discipline are eligible to apply for any of the offered MTech specialisations.

faqs.question: Can I get direct admission to MTech at Madhyanchal Professional University?
faqs.answer: Madhyanchal Professional University offers admission to the MTech course based on the merit of the aspirants in the last qualifying exam. Candidates must also fulfil the eligibility criteria for admission. For MTech, aspirants must pass a bachelor's Degree or equivalent in the relevant field with at least 50% aggregate. Once selected, candidates need to report at the campus for document verification and fee payment.

faqs.question: What is the eligibility for MTech at Madhyanchal Professional University?
faqs.answer: Aspirants who have passed a bachelor's Degree or equivalent in the relevant field with at least 50% aggregate can apply for the MTech programme at Madhyanchal Professional University. There is a relaxation of 5% in the aggregate for SC, ST and OBC candidates. Such aspirants are required to secure a minimum of 45% aggregate in their graduation. Candidates must hold the documents proving their eligibility for verification at the time of admission.

reviews.review_heading: Excellent faculty and facilities, but disappointing placements.
reviews.review_text: We have a multistory building that contains 25 classrooms, 8 labs, 1 library, 4 staffrooms and a principal office. We have a large campus, a playground in beyond, and a canteen at walking distance. The college don't have a hostel so we have to stay at PGs or rental rooms, which is a major problem faced by students. The food in the canteen is outstanding, especially samosas; you will fall in love. The college has its own hospital with 40+ beds and environment is fabulous. We play pool games, badm...

reviews.review_heading:
Average college with worst management and worst placement rate this year.
Infrastructure is everage.
reviews.review_text: The labs are not good at all, and some computers in our lab do not even work. There is no hostel. The food in the canteen is pretty good, but the price is a little bit high. There is also a basketball court and a volleyball court. There is also a massive cricket field.

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied with the faculty members but dissatisfied by the colleges fake scenarios.
reviews.review_text: Excellent infrastructure; the canteen facility is excellent as well. There is a library, auditorium, temple, playground, and 7 buildings of 3 floors each. Overall, the infrastructure is satisfactory. The medical center is located in the nursing building. The auditorium is very large, with a minimum seating capacity of 100.

reviews.review_heading: The truth of the low-grade college.
reviews.review_text: The college in which I am studying is a low-grade college with poor infrastructure and very bad management. The computer lab is just for show. There is no Wi-Fi on the campus, the library is small, the books there are outdated and it was closed during exam time when we students needed it the most.

reviews.review_heading: I am absolutely dissatisfied because of faculty.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is not available in this institution. Labs are available, so you can practice on a laptop or PC in the lab. The library is available. They give us books for 6 months. After that, we return to these books. We play volleyball, cricket, and kabaddi.

reviews.review_heading: It is a very good college, and you can go for it.
reviews.review_text: The labs and library are very good, but the classrooms are not good. Wi-Fi is not available on our campus. Food is affordable. Sports teams are available, and you can play any time. Medical facilities are available at any time.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with placements of this college.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our university is beautiful, spacious, and a very nice environment. Wi-Fi is available on campus. Labs, classrooms, and a library are available. Hostel facilities and quality of food served are very nice. A canteen and medical facilities are available. Sports and games are available at our university.

Although, to conclude, the University has an average fee structure that makes it accessible to the masses.

reviews_list.review_title: I am absolutely dissatisfied after joining this college. Still, I am unemployed.

review_content.Placements: None of the companies has been visited our college for placements. Our college doesn't provide placement training, but it charges fees for that. There are no recruiting companies for our college. The salary packages offered to students depends on their academic marks. None of the students got selected for internships because there is no placement training. Our college didn't do anything regarding placements and internships.
review_content.Infrastructure: There are no proper facilities in our college. Our college lacks staff members, but the environment is good. However, there are classrooms, a library, purified water, canteen and ground. But the ground is full of grass and not maintained properly, and there is a gym. Buses are available to every place, and there is a temple in our college. Laboratories are maintained properly. Our college doesn't provide for sports players like football and cricket. I am a day scholar, so I don't know about our college hostel facilities.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.E. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2016
reviews_list.review_title: Studying in that college provides degree only.

review_content.Placements: Placements are rare and only few campus interviews are conducted. Only 10% students are placed. The maximum salary is 2 Lacs per annum. The placement cell is not efficient. No core companies in placement list. Due to less number of eligible students, no big companies conducted interviews.
review_content.Infrastructure: The college has all major facilities, the buildings and devices are not fine. Some of them are unusable. The food is average and cost effective, there is lack of lab equipments and guides. There is no oppertinuity to do our own projects. Class room feels like school.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.E. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2016
reviews_list.review_title: Average infrastructure, not highly qualified but friendly faculty, poor placement assistance.

review_content.Placements: There is no placement assistance for the mechanical engineering department. The only companies that came for the placement drive were BPO companies that recruited students from all departments. No student got any job in the core field and no internship is provided by the college.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is average. When compared to engineering colleges in Kerala, Sri Subramanya College is just below average. It has average classroom and lab facilities. There are no AC classrooms as said in the brochure. The gymnasium is too below par. It just comprises of a small room for a namesake. The canteen is worse. Menu and facilities are comparable to low-class canteens seen in some matriculation schools. It looks great from the outside because of the plantation and the entrance. But as soon as you step in, the poverty of the college management can be seen.

reviews_list.review_title: It is a perfect college for engineering students.

review_content.Placements: 70% of students get placed in various IT companies. The highest package is 12 LPA, and the average package is 7 LPA. The lowest package is 3 LPA. Students get placed in companies like Wipro, Accenture, etc. Roles offered are data analyst, web developer, etc.
review_content.Infrastructure: Various facilities are provided by the college and our department which include lab facilities and hospitality services. Classrooms are very attractive and dynamic for teaching. The hostel provides good food for better health and living. The campus conducts various sports tournaments like cricket and football.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Information Technology - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: It has great placements and vibrant campus life.

review_content.Placements: Out batch has an impressive placement and around 90% of students get a job. The highest package offered is 10 LPA, the lowest package is 3 LPA and the average package offered is 7 LPA. Top recruiting companies like Accenture, TCS, Infosys, and HCL visited our college for placements. An internship is another big success here. Nearly 75% of students get internships in companies like TCS, Infosys, and HCL. Most of us took up roles like software developers, data scientists, business analysts, and AI/ML engineers. Overall, the course prepared us well for in-demand tech and analytics careers.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Priyadarshini Bhagwati College of Engineering takes priority as the best for engineering.

content.Placements: Good companies come to our campus, but they are not sure to give placement to everyone. Packages are not very high. The average package is a minimum of 15 LPA. Companies like Tech Mahindra, TCS, and others come for placements, but it's not guaranteed that all students get placed.
content.Infrastructure: The first appearance of our college is good, but there is no hostel facility. Students have to take rooms near the college or stay in Nagpur. The college campus is very good, well-maintained, and a nice campus for being an engineer.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: There are no good peer groups, opportunities, or placements.

content.Placements: Only a few students get placed on campus. Most of the students go for off-campus or any other career paths. The top recruiting company is TCS I guess. The average package is 3 LPA. Top role offered is data analyst or software engineer. The lowest package is 1.5 LPA and the highest package is 6 LPA. Very few students are interested in internships and no paid internships are provided by the college.
content.Infrastructure: Classrooms are small but clean. The library is nice and has Wi-Fi. The canteen is good. The quality of food is fine and eatable. We will get snacks, samosas, cold drinks, chocolates, chips, etc. There are not many sports facilities. There is no hostel facility from the college. There are also no medical facilities or any special sports facilities. Only one ground is there to play games.

individual_reviews.title: It is a perfect college for engineering students.

content.Placements: 70% of students get placed in various IT companies. The highest package is 12 LPA, and the average package is 7 LPA. The lowest package is 3 LPA. Students get placed in companies like Wipro, Accenture, etc. Roles offered are data analyst, web developer, etc.
content.Infrastructure: Various facilities are provided by the college and our department which include lab facilities and hospitality services. Classrooms are very attractive and dynamic for teaching. The hostel provides good food for better health and living. The campus conducts various sports tournaments like cricket and football.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Information Technology - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: It has great placements and vibrant campus life.

content.Placements: Out batch has an impressive placement and around 90% of students get a job. The highest package offered is 10 LPA, the lowest package is 3 LPA and the average package offered is 7 LPA. Top recruiting companies like Accenture, TCS, Infosys, and HCL visited our college for placements. An internship is another big success here. Nearly 75% of students get internships in companies like TCS, Infosys, and HCL. Most of us took up roles like software developers, data scientists, business analysts, and AI/ML engineers. Overall, the course prepared us well for in-demand tech and analytics careers.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Information Technology - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: Genuine Thoughts of a Common Student.

content.Placements: 20% of students were placed. I can say the companies that were coming for hiring offered very low packages. ITNetworkz is one of the companies that used to hire a lot of members on our campus. They used to offer roles like Associate Software Engineer and some BPO roles.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure was good enough, but the facilities at our time were quite limited. No Wi-Fi facilities were provided, and classrooms had old desk benches, etc. The library had the least number of books available, no new published books, and the availability of books was also limited.

reviews.review_heading: Priyadarshini Bhagwati College of Engineering takes priority as the best for engineering.
reviews.review_text: The first appearance of our college is good, but there is no hostel facility. Students have to take rooms near the college or stay in Nagpur. The college campus is very good, well-maintained, and a nice campus for being an engineer.

reviews.review_heading: There are no good peer groups, opportunities, or placements.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms are small but clean. The library is nice and has Wi-Fi. The canteen is good. The quality of food is fine and eatable. We will get snacks, samosas, cold drinks, chocolates, chips, etc. There are not many sports facilities. There is no hostel facility from the college. There are also no medical facilities or any special sports facilities. Only one ground is there to play games.

reviews.review_heading: It is a perfect college for engineering students.
reviews.review_text: Various facilities are provided by the college and our department which include lab facilities and hospitality services. Classrooms are very attractive and dynamic for teaching. The hostel provides good food for better health and living. The campus conducts various sports tournaments like cricket and football.

reviews.review_heading: It has great placements and vibrant campus life.
reviews.review_text: Our course has great infrastructure, including high-speed Wi-Fi, modern labs, smart classrooms, and a library with digital resources. Hostels are clean and comfortable, with 24x7 Wi-Fi and recreation areas. The mess food is decent. The canteen has good snacks. We also have access to medical facilities. It has plenty of sports options like football, badminton, and indoor games. It supports us in everything like studies and overall growth.

reviews.review_heading: Genuine Thoughts of a Common Student.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure was good enough, but the facilities at our time were quite limited. No Wi-Fi facilities were provided, and classrooms had old desk benches, etc. The library had the least number of books available, no new published books, and the availability of books was also limited.

reviews.review_heading: I Am Satisfied with My College and Also with My Degree
reviews.review_text: We have a computer lab, library, sports room, canteen, garden, and digital classroom facilities. Our college does not provide hostel facilities. The canteen food quality is good, and they maintain hygiene. Our college also provides medical facilities like first aid treatment, and there is a sports room for indoor games and a big ground for outdoor games.

reviews.review_heading: BE it student review 2019 - 2022.
reviews.review_text: As per my view, the only drawbacks in the infrastructure are the poor parking facilities (especially during the rainy season) and the cafeteria. Other than this, everything in the infrastructure is good, including well-equipped computer and other labs, the library, classrooms, washrooms on each floor for both genders, and drinking water on every floor.

reviews.review_heading: Review about Priyadarshini Bhagwati College of Engineering.
reviews.review_text: Good Wi-Fi is provided, which has good speed, classrooms are well maintained and maintenance is done on a monthly and daily basis. Teaching and non-teaching staff are really good in this college and hostel facilities are provided for girls and boys, both of whom receive quality education.

reviews.review_heading: Very good experience and excellent performance of students and good teaching.
reviews.review_text: Very good infrastructure. Having very good facilities. Also good campus. Having green and environment space. And best nature doing activities. Having free wi-fi to whole college. Having large space to performing creative activities,  100 of students were selected in competition with state and division level.

reviews.review_heading: I am not satisfied with sports facilities of this college.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is average on our campus. Boys' hostel is not available in this college. Playground is not available. Canteen is average in this college. Laboratory is decent but the equipment is not up to mark. Computer laboratories are available.

reviews.review_heading: I'm satisfied with this college.
reviews.review_text: Library and Wi-Fi are good. Classrooms are spacious. Teachers support students to take part in sports activities with a supportive sports instructor. Medical facilities are available in our college. Canteen is good and hygienic. It serves all the snacks at reasonable prices.

reviews.review_heading: I suggest you choose this college only if you want to study.
reviews.review_text: Our college doesn't provide any hostel. The canteen is just like a small shop where you can get only the samosa. I never heard about medical facilities in our college. Our college staff members emphasise only academics and do not even consider sports. We got the Wi-Fi, but no one knows the password. There is a library, but students generally are not allowed into it. Labs and classrooms are good.

reviews.review_heading: Good college to take admission and enjoy. Good faculty and surroundings.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure depends on course. Facilities provided by the college are average. Wi-Fi is not available. Many labs are available and PCs are available and are properly working. Big classrooms are available. They have a capacity of continuing 100 students at a time.

reviews.review_heading: Good choice for b teach students.
reviews.review_text: Very good infrastructure environment wise but no Wi-Fi and sports are good mess are good and canteen are good overall all good things in this college environment wise very good college as well green environment As per my view, the only drawbacks in the infrastructure are the poor parking facilities (especially during the rainy season) and the cafeteria. Other than this, everything in the infrastructure is good, including well-equipped computer and other labs, the library, classrooms, washrooms o...

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely well developed and good facilities and placement in 2017.
reviews.review_text: All the facilities are available such as labs, computer room, Wi-Fi, classroom, digital room, etc. The quality of food is good like cricket, football, volleyball, hockey, etc.

reviews_list.review_title: A student life at UCEK Trivandrum.

review_content.Placements: In the 20-24 batch, only 2 students were placed in our course. The placement cell is really not active and there are no great placement opportunities. The salary was around 3.5 LPA for an 8.9 CGPA student. The college is not recommended for students who want placements, etc.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering (Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning) - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: I am completely satisfied because of the campus.

content.Placements: It is the best engineering college that ever existed. 95% of students got placed last year. More than 3,000 companies approached the college for interns from Technopark in Kazhakuttom. It is located in Kerala and it has the biggest campus. It has eco friendly campus and the atmosphere is great.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure and facilities at our campus are quite impressive and well-maintained. Classrooms are spacious and equipped with modern teaching aids which enhance the learning experience. Laboratories are stocked with updated equipment. It allows students to gain valuable practical exposure.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech in Computer Science Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Overall very good college, satisfied with faculty, placements, infrastructure, events, etc.

content.Placements: Many students got placed into different companies from all over the world depending upon grades and their CGPA. 81% of students got placed in companies from college placement and other private ways. The highest package is more than a lakh and the minimum is Rs. 20,000 in my course. Top recruiting companies in our college are Technopark UST, Global, TCS, Tata, etc. 81% of students from my course got placed into different companies mentioned above. Top roles offered are engineer, software developer, web designer, manager, etc.
content.Infrastructure: The quality and infrastructure available in our college are average at best. Classrooms are average for a typical government college. The lab is better compared to classes. There are high-functioning laptops and computers. The lab works in an air conditioning system. The library also contains all kinds of books from different authors, textbooks, reference books, many informative books, and magazines. The hostel facilities are very good. It has very good tasting and quality food. It has first-aid medical facilities and a functioning health center. There is also a sports ground for football, cricket, volleyball, and badminton. Overall good infrastructure.

overview_faqs.question: Why to choose Arya Group of Colleges?
overview_faqs.answer: Arya Group of Colleges is one of the eminent colleges which offers quality education to the students. The college offers UG, PG and Diploma programme in Engineering, Management and Pharmacy. The college has well-equipped infratsrcture with many facilities available for the students. Students are guided by expert faculty members with years of experience.

overview_faqs.question: Can Arya Group of Colleges be considered a good college?
overview_faqs.answer: Arya Group of Colleges is a reputed institute for B.Tech. Students can opt these programs to pursue their career in Engineering. Institute has trained & experienced faculty who deliver these programs. Arya Group of Colleges has a review rating of 4.5 on the basis of reviews by students. In addition to this, it has been rated 4.3 on campuslife, 4.3 on placements, 4.5 on faculty and 4.8 on Infrastructure.

review_summary.college_name: Arya Group of Colleges Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Artificial Intelligence and Data Science - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: Average college, better to try other colleges in Jaipur.

content.Placements: In my branch, 75% students get placed. The highest package is 32 LPA, the average package is 4-5 LPA, and the lowest is 2.4 LPA. Top recruiting companies are Flipkart, Delta X, and Shriram Finance. Around 30-40% students get internships in my branch. Top roles offered are software development engineer, consultancy, etc.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the college is decent. In my branch, classrooms do not have AC. Labs are good, well-maintained. Wi-Fi speed is good all over the campus. The condition of the library is good, and all types of books are present. I am a day scholar, so I don't have a very good idea about the hostel, but my colleagues say that the hostel is decent, not that good, the mess food is just eatable, and there are so many restrictions.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: Good placements and student life.

content.Placements: Nearly 80% of students got placed. The top recruiting companies are Microsoft, Amazon, and Wipro. The highest salary package offered is 10 LPA, and the lowest salary package offered is 3 LPA. The top roles are project manager and web developer. 65% of students got an internship.
content.Infrastructure: The college infrastructure is good. The computer labs are well-equipped with Wi-Fi connections. The classrooms are neat with comfortable benches. There are many books available in the library. The hostel facilities are good. The bedrooms are comfortable. The food is good, and the canteen is also available. The sports facilities are good.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Artificial Intelligence and Data Science - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: It is really good and the best college.

content.Placements: Up to 90% of students are placed in companies. All roles offered in courses. Many students have completed their internships, and more companies are coming. The average package here is between 5-6 LPA, and this year as well, very good companies came for placement.
content.Infrastructure: Everything is available here, like Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, and a library. The living facilities here are good, the hostel is good, and the food is also good. The hostel wardens are good, and there is a 24/7 Wi-Fi facility. There is also equipment for sports.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Placement was good till 2022 but many of the IT company blacklisted this college.

content.Placements: 25% students got placed on campus in session 2025, whereas 35% of students got off-campus placements. Many of them are at a call centre. The highest package is 8 LPA off-campus, the lowest is 1.5 LPA, whereas the average package is 2 LPA-3 LPA. More sales companies come here. 20%-30% of students got placed off-campus from B.Tech in CSE and Robotics.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure is above average. Wi-Fi is available mostly 24/7, and in a few cases, it's not working, but Wi-Fi is good. They provide a ducting facility in summer, but it is limited. Classrooms are not very high-tech, but it's good. The quality of food is very disappointing, but the water is good.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: The college is good, and All India Robotics is also available in our college.

content.Placements: About 80% of B.Tech students in this course get placed because today is the computer era, and computer skills are in most demand. The lowest package offered by the college is 5 LPA, and the highest package is 10 LPA. Top recruiting companies are Infosys, Wipro, and TCS. Overall, 70% of students get placed.
content.Infrastructure: The college is okay. Labs are modern, and all robotics labs are available in the college. The hostel is good, and the messy food is also okay. Money-relevant hostel facilities are provided for students. Medical facilities are also available. Students who suffer from any disease are immediately shifted to the hospital.

reviews.review_heading: Meet 2nd or 3rd year seniors they give you the best review about the college.
reviews.review_text: College infrastructure is good but hostels are crowded. One room consists of 3 students having fee Rs 90,000. Classrooms are as simple as school. Library is big but all there are old books and students go there to gossip. Hostel room is good having 3 almiras, 1 attached bathroom, 2 fans, 2 LED lights, and 3 plus attached near study ...

reviews.review_heading: The college is good but technical knowledge is less.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi: Campus and hostels are Wi-Fi enabled. Speed is generally sufficient for study, browsing, and project work, though it can vary during peak hours. Labs: Well-equipped labs for CSE, ECE, ME, CE, and other branches. Labs include Computer Labs, IoT Labs, Networking Labs, Robotics Labs, etc. Labs are regularly updated with modern hardware and licensed software like MATLAB, AutoCAD, and Oracle. Classrooms: Spacious classrooms with projectors and smart boards in some blocks. Seating and ventilati...

reviews.review_heading: Don't take admission without taking review of the current student studying in that college.
reviews.review_text: There is no Wi-Fi for personal use, and the labs have old systems. Classrooms are equipped with whiteboards and fans, and some have projectors. The library has a limited selection of books. The hostel rooms fit three people and only have fans; the food quality in the hostel is poor. The canteen is good but expensive. There are no medical facilities on campus, but ambulance service is available to transport you to the hostel.

reviews.review_heading: Think twice and take a review from a current student of that college in personally.
reviews.review_text: No Wi-Fi for personal use in the whole college. Labs have old machines, old software, and old computers. Classrooms are good with fans, and whiteboards, and some have projectors. The big library has old books. Hostels have 3-seater rooms with an annual price of 1 lakh rupees. The food quality is worst. The canteen is good but expensive and overcharged. There are no on-campus medical facilities; only one old van as an ambulance is present to drop you off at the hospital. There is no cricket groun...

reviews.review_heading: Placement and labs are not good. Only a few companies visit for placements.

Hostel facilities are rough according to the fees. Sports facilities are not good, with only a few sports available. Medical facilities are not available on campus.

reviews.review_heading: This college is good for average middle-class students who don't have much money.

In the hostel, the quality of facilities is just below average because the quality of food is not good, and sports are dead, and games too. The canteen food is good but too expensive.

reviews.review_heading: Arya College of Engineering can be a good choice for you at a very affordable price.
reviews.review_text: Hostel and mess facilities are decent, although they could be improved in terms of cleanliness and food variety. The hostel food is healthy and hygienic. Hostelers enjoy various fun activities like DJ nights on Saturdays. Wi-Fi connectivity is also provided in the hostel.

reviews.review_heading: The college provides good placements now.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi, library, and classrooms are very nice. The mess food is also good. The medical facilities are also available. Students can study in the library to improve their academics. Wi-Fi facility is so good that students can learn more and more things from the internet.

My College Life

College sucks
reviews.review_text: Hostel is 10/30. Hostel food facilities are stopped since last one and half year due to tender is not being passed even after so many complains. We don't have beds to sleep, We sleep on mattress by spreading on ground. Hoping things will get good soon.

college_info.intro: The flagship programmes offered at Rayat-Bahra University are BTech and MBA. The university offers these programmes to students at the UG and PG levels. placements.overview:
As per the latest report, the offered during in 2025 stood at More than visited the campus in 2025 and provided jobs in over 50 domains. The top recruiters of Rayat Bahra University Powered by Sunstone, in 2025 included Nestle, Amul, Paytm, SBI General, Axis Bank, Muthoot Finance, HDFC Life, Coca-Cola, Zomato, Grow, Wipro, Paisabazar, and many more.

Sunstone’s Placement Opportunity Program (POP) offers students access to 200+ assured placement opportunities, or a refund of their first-year tuition fee if placements don’t meet the commitment. To be eligible for POP, students must maintain a minimum average attendance of 70% across all credit and non-credit classes in every semester. They are also required to clear all examinations with a minimum score of 80% or equivalent CGPA, and must not have any backlogs. In addition, students must ensure that all fee payments are made as per the timeline outlined in the offer letter. Lastly, students must strictly adhere to the Sunstone Placement Policy Guidelines throughout the program.

reviews_list.review_title: Review of Rayat-Bahra University [RBU].

review_content.Placements: Around 70-80% of students got placed in our college. The highest salary package offered ranges between 10 LPA - 15 LPA. The average salary package offered ranges between 4 LPA - 6 LPA. The lowest salary package offered ranges between 2 LPA - 3 LPA. Some top recruiting companies are TCS, Infosys, Wipro, Cognizant, IBM, etc. Around 50-60% of students got internships in TCS, Infosys, Wipro, etc. Top roles offered are software developer, IT consultant, system analyst, web developer, network engineer, etc.
review_content.Infrastructure: Our college provides us with all facilities. Our college has a library and labs. Wi-Fi facility is available in classrooms. A few computers run without any problem. All the remaining computers have some problems like software or ethernet problem. Physics and chemistry labs are good. They provide all the required facilities. The hostel rooms are average. They provide 3 beds in each room. The food served in the mess is good, healthy, and tasty. They provide sports and games facilities.

admission_process.title: RBU powered by Sunstone Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: RBU, powered by Sunstone, admission2025 to courses is entrance-based. Aspirants must sit and appear for a Screening test, interview, and document upload.Rayat Bahar University, powered by Sunstone,offers four courses at undergraduate and postgraduate levels in the fields of Management, Engineering,and Computer Applications.

Rayat Bahra University powered by Sunstone courses are offered at undergraduate and postgraduate levels. Candidates seeking admission are required to meet the eligibility criteria and apply to their desired course. Applicants are then required to appear for the selection rounds determined by the college. The following table mentions the eligibility and selection forRayat Bahra University powered by Sunstone courses:
Graduate with a 50% aggregate
Class 12 with Physics, Mathematics and Chemistry / Diploma* (in relevant branch of Engineering and Technology) with at least 50% marks (45% for reserved category).
Class 12 with a 50% aggregate
Class 10 and 12 with a 60% aggregate
Download:RBU_2025 Brochure Powered by Sunstone

The admission process for theRayat-Bahra University powered by Sunstone courseconsists of multiple stages. In the first stage, candidates need to register on the Sunstone official website. Next, candidates are required to go through the selection process, based on which the university will shortlist candidates for final admission. The document verification process is the last step in theRayat Bahra Universitypowered by the Sunstone selection process. After completion of the selection rounds, RBU shortlists candidates based on their performance. Shortlisted candidates need to pay the admission confirmation fee to book their seats.
The RBU admission process stages are as mentioned below:
Step 1: RBU powered by Sunstone Application process

Interested candidates are required to visit the official website of RBU powered by Sunstone to apply for their desired course. Students can also check the detailedRayat-Bahra University powered by Sunstone feestructure here.
Step 2: RBU powered by Sunstone selection process
Applicants are required to appear for the relevant entrance exam. Those who perform well in both rounds are invited to the document verification round.
Step 3: Seat Booking
Shortlisted candidates are required to pay the admission confirmation fee to book their seats.

placement_data.title: Rayat Bahra University Powered by Sunstone Placement Overview 2025
paragraphs: Rayat Bhra University powered by Sunstone’s Placement Opportunity Program (POP) gives students access to over 200 guaranteed placement opportunities , or they can get a refund of their first-year tuition if the placements don’t fulfill the promise. To qualify for POP, students need to keep a minimum average attendance of 70% in all their credit and non-credit classes each semester. They also have to pass all exams with at least an 80% score or the equivalent CGPA, and they shouldn’t have any backlogs. Moreover, students must make sure that all fee payments are done according to the schedule mentioned in the offer letter. Finally, students are expected to follow the Sunstone Placement Policy Guidelines throughout the program.

Rayat Bahra University Powered by Sunstone trains its students for a variety of job profiles through more than 100 hours of job-focused boot camps . To ensure that the placement-centric sessions are completed successfully, the University's placement team also monitors the dynamic changes occurring globally.

As per the latest report, the highest and average package offered during Rayat Bahra University Powered by Sunstone placements in 2025 stood at INR 26 LPA and INR 4.6 LPA, respectively. More than 1,200 companies visited the campus in 2025 and provided jobs in over 50 domains . The top recruiters of Rayat Bahra University Powered by Sunstone in 2025 included Nestle, Amul, Paytm, SBI General, Axis Bank, Muthoot Finance, HDFC Life, Coca-Cola, Zomato, Grow, Wipro, Paisabazar, and many more.

hostel.description:
Hostel facility is available for long-distance students who wish to avail it. Each hostel has a healthy atmosphere for the students, who are far away from their parents. Each hostel has an activity centre, common room, reading room, dining room with mess, canteen till late hours and other basic amenities like hot water supply in winter. 
Separate hostels for boys/girls which are Wifi enabled are available on a triple sharing  basis room with attached washrooms. Two new hostels are under construction to provide in house residential facilities to aspiring students.

paragraphs: The total tuition fees of MBA is INR 2.5 lakh. Candidates are required to pay the course fee after completion of all the selection rounds to confirm their seats. In case, a candidate is unable to pay the fee within the specified time, his or her admission will stand cancelled. Candidates will also require to pay a registration fee to apply for admission. This information is sourced from official website/ sanctioning body and is subject to change.

RBU, powered by Sunstone, admission to courses is entrance-based. Aspirants must sit and appear for a Screening test, interview, and document upload. Rayat Bahar University, powered by Sunstone, offers four courses at undergraduate and postgraduate levels in the fields of Management, Engineering, and Computer Applications. INR 2.5 lakh

RBU powered by Sunstone offers scholarships to deserving and meritorious students. The university offers Bright Minds scholarship. This scholarship are awarded based on their JEE Mains score or Class 12 marks (for BTech) and CAT/XAT percentile (for MBA), recognising academic excellence. The university also offers scholarship Up to 100% scholarship based on SAT score. The meritorious students, prolific athletes, and other achievers with high scores in the Sunstone Admission Test (SAT) will receive financial support for their higher education.

review_summary.college_name: MIT Group of Institutes (Mahakal), Ujjain Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Business Administration (BBA) - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: I am disappointed by faculty members and bus problems. One can take admission just for.

content.Placements: There are no placements for graduation students, no internship opportunities, and no classes. The highest package is 9 LPA. Companies like ICICI and many others recruit. This year, internships were offered only to final-year and second-year students, with sales roles available.
content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi facility is not very good, and there is no Wi-Fi facility in the institute. Classrooms are suffocating, and the library does not have books related to the courses. We can't find any useful books for our studies. There are only business magazines and English newspapers, which are of no use. I am not sure about the hostel facilities as I haven’t opted for it. Sports are conducted once a year.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Information Technology Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Overall, college is good in terms of discipline and studies .

content.Placements: According to your question, about 65% of students get placed in my college. The average package at my college is approximately 4-5 lacs; the lowest package was 2 lacs; and the highest package currently is 27 lacs. The top recruiting companies in my college are Google, Microsoft and others.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of my college is very good, all the things or facilities are available, the classrooms are clean, the benches and chairs are fine, the fans are in good condition; and there is water cooler now, if we talk about. Labs: there are many labs that are also in very good condition. So, overall infrastructure is very good .

MIT Group of Institutes (Mahakal),  Ujjain has below criteria for taking admissions to it's various courses:CoursesEligibilityB.Sc.Candidate must have completed 10+2 from a recognized education boardBBACandidate must have completed 10+2 from a recognized education boardUG DiplomaCandidates from open school are eligible for admission as per DTE.B.E. / B.TechCandidate must have completed 10+2 or equivalent qualification with Physics, Mathematics and Chemistry/ Biotechnology/ Biology/ Technical Vocational subject as optional subjects with the above-mentioned aggregate percentage in subjects taken together.

description: MIT Group of Institutes (Mahakal), Ujjain cutoff 2025 was released via MPBE entrance exam for admission to the B.E. / B.Tech course. For the General HS category students, the last round cutoff range was between 1194669 and 1456534 for B.E. / B.Tech admission. Considering the lowest cutoff rank of 1194669, B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering turned out to be the most competitive branch for admission. In the first round, the cutoff rank for the same branch was 481740.
Considering the JEE Main last round cutoff 2025 for the General HS category students, the top most competitive course for admission was B.E. / B.Tech, with a cutoff rank closing at 1194669.

reviews.review_heading: I am disappointed by faculty members and bus problems. One can take admission just for.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi facility is not very good, and there is no Wi-Fi facility in the institute. Classrooms are suffocating, and the library does not have books related to the courses. We can't find any useful books for our studies. There are only business magazines and English newspapers, which are of no use. I am not sure about the hostel facilities as I haven’t opted for it. Sports are conducted once a year.

reviews.review_heading: Overall, college is good in terms of discipline and studies .
reviews.review_text:
The infrastructure of my college is very good, all the things or facilities are available, the classrooms are clean, the benches and chairs are fine, the fans are in good condition; and there is water cooler now, if we talk about. Labs: there are many labs that are also in very good condition. So, overall infrastructure is very good 
.

reviews.review_heading: Our college provides average placements and the fee structure is budget-friendly.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is very good. Our campus is spread over 35 acres of land.  Laboratories and libraries are well-maintained. Hostel facilities are decent. The food served in the mess is good at reasonable prices. Medical facilities are not good.

reviews.review_heading: Our college is good in all aspects.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is good. Our college has a large playground, a canteen, a campus, a bus facility, and a hostel facility. You can contact college administration from city offices for any query. Our college provides sports facilities for students.

reviews.review_heading: Review of MIT Group of Institutes.
reviews.review_text: Campus is spread over a large area with separate buildings for different courses. Our campus is enabled with Wi-Fi. Canteen, library, computer labs, and sports ground are available in our college. Hostel mess food is average.

reviews.review_heading: Our college had good infrastructure and excellent placements in 2019.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure was excellent. The environment was very friendly and healthy. The hostel was available only for boys. The canteen was available. The bus facility was good. Sports and games were excellent. The mess facilities were available for hostelers.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely Satisfied from college. Everything is good in college.
reviews.review_text: There are 5 labs in our college and also the latest computer at present. There is a common library of the college in which our branch related books are found. There is also an additional book. Medical facilities are also good. In sports college people support a lot .

reviews.review_heading: One of the best college in Ujjain is MIT.
reviews.review_text:
In my college around 40 faculty members are available.
Different subject teachers are available in my college.
40 classrooms and library are available for studying.
In hostel  good quality food is available for eg dal, rice, vegetable , roti etc.
For eating food mess is available.

reviews.review_heading: Overall, our college is the best.
reviews.review_text: Everything is available on campus. The teachers are supportive. The hostel is very good. All the facilities are available in the hostel.

reviews.review_heading: The college is good and in 2022, 40 students have been placed in many pharmaceutical companies .
reviews.review_text: In the MIT campus, the building of pharmaceutical studies is good. There is many classrooms and laboratories for practical and the college is also providing hostel facility. The hostel is inside the campus. There is a sports ground behind the hostel and the hostel fees is decent.

reviews.review_heading: Our college soo good, facilities are soo supportive. All the building of mit group is well designed.
reviews.review_text: Facilities are not so bad there's no Wi-Fi for students and classrooms don't have Air conditioners available only fans are there. Labs are good. The infrastructure is eco-friendly and has a lot of greenery. The girl's hostel is not there. Mess and canteen food are good. Medical facilities are not there. It has only a basketball ground.

reviews.review_heading: The college provides good placements.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college and hostel is good. Wi-Fi is available. Labs are held every day. The classroom contains a smart class. There is a huge library. Good food is available at the canteen. Medical facilities are good. Good opportunities are available in sports and games. Nodal and cultural events are conducted.

reviews.review_heading: The campus life is amazing and the faculty members are very professional and classified.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is so big. The campus and the ground are the places to chill. There is a canteen and a small garden. The college has Wi-Fi facility and 4 computer labs. The classrooms are very clean and the library is also very good. The qualities of the facilities in the hostel are very good. The food of the hostel mess is hygienic and that of the canteen is the best. Medical facilities are also available.

reviews.review_heading: Review of MIT Group of Institutes (Mahakal), Ujjain.
reviews.review_text: Facilities are average, and it becomes less good due to the COVID-19. Labs are not provided by proper glassware and chemicals as well. The library is well provided by various books, encyclopedias, and pharmacopeia. The canteen is also good. The auditorium is well maintained.

reviews.review_heading: Our college is of a high standard in the Ujjain area, and there is no ragging.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is well-built. They are providing every needy thing required to students inside the college. A very wide infrastructure is built and has different sections for all branches. All in one field of studies are available here. There are good playgrounds. Hostels are also provided for students who are from out of the station. The canteen is very good. Library facilities are also provided in a very well mannered.
