faqs.question: What is the placement package offered at Alpine Group of Institutes?

faqs.answer: A:    Yes, you can definitely pursue a BPharm degree after completing a DPharma at Alpine Group of Institutes. Usually, when you finish a DPharm, you don't have to start BPharm from the first year. Instead, you can join directly in the second year. This is called lateral entry. So, instead of a four-year course, BPharm will only take three years for you. This is a popular way to continue studying because it helps you learn more and get a higher degree in Pharmacy. Therefore, DPharm students who join BPharm in the second year only need to study for three years.
faqs.question: Can I pursue BPharm after completing my DPharm from Alpine Group of Institutes?

faqs.answer: A:    No, candidates from the Commerce stream cannot pursue a DPharm programme at Alpine Group of Institutions. DPharm programme require candidates to complete their higher senior secondary with Science subjects, specifically- Physics, Chemistry, Biology/Mathematics. Commerce students do not study these necessary subjects in Class 12, they would not meet the eligibility criteria for admission to Dpharm programme at Alpine Group of Institutes.
faqs.question: I'm a commerce student. Can I do DPharma at AGI after my Class 12?

faqs.answer: A:    Admission to the DPharm programme at Alpine Group of Institutes is based on both Class 12 scores and UBTER JEEP scores. The application form for UBTER JEEP 2024 was released on January 20, and the last date to apply was May 15. Prospective students must have applied within this period to be considered for admission. The exact exam date is crucial for candidates, and it is recommended to check the official UBTER website or contact the admissions office of Alpine Group of Institutes for the most accurate and updated information regarding the exam date.
faqs.question: What is UBTER JEEP 2024 exam date for admission to DPharm at Alpine Group of Institutes?

faqs.answer: A:    Yes, admission to the Diploma in Pharmacy programme at Alpine Group of Institutes is based on merit, primarily evaluated on Class 12 scores. The college accepts UBTER JEEP scores, but candidates with a strong academic record in Class 12 are also eligible for admission. This programme offers a platform for aspiring pharmacists to excel in their studies and develop a solid foundation in pharmaceutical sciences. In addittion, the curriculum for the DPharm course at Alpine Group of Institutes is designed in accordance with the standards set by the Pharmacy Council of India.
faqs.question: Can I join Alpine Group of Institutes DPharm programme without UBTER JEEP?

admission_process.title: Alpine Group of Institutes Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: Alpine Group of Institutes admission 2025is currently open. The institute offers courses, such as BSc, BCA, MSc, etc., at the UG and PG level. Apart from the UG and PG courses, the institute also offers diploma and aviation courses. To get admitted to the Alpine Group of Institutions, candidates must meet the eligibility criteria set by the institute. The college offers more than 10 courses in the streams of Aviation, Engineering, IT & Software, etc. The application process atAlpine Group of Institutesis conducted online. Read the following article to know more aboutAlpine Group of Institutescourse admission2025.

Alpine Group of Institutes admission 2025is based on CUET exam score. Alpine Group of Institutes offers over 10 courses at the UG and PG levels in multiple streams like Aviation, Engineering, IT & Software, etc. Check out the following table for details aroundAlpine Group of Institutescourse admissions2025:
Particulars
Alpine Group of Institutes Admission Highlights 2025
Mode of study
Programmes Offered
Admission status 2025
How to apply?
Level of programmes offered

Alpine Group of Institutes offers a diverse range of courses through its various schools of study. The university is committed to providing quality education across disciplines, including Engineering, Computer Application, and Commerce. The following table mentions the eligibility and selection for some of the popularAlpine Group of Institutes courses:

Alpine Group of Institutes offers a diverse array of courses across its schools, encompassing BBA, BCA, BCom, and more. For the academic year 2025, the admission process is outlined below, presenting key steps for prospective students:
STEP 1: Online Application

Interested candidates initiating the admission process at Alpine Group of Institutes must complete the online application on the official website. Ensuring timely submission of applications is crucial, along with the payment of the requisite application fee.
STEP 2: Eligibility Check and Selection Criteria

Following application submission, the institute conducts a comprehensive eligibility check, evaluating academic qualifications and other relevant criteria. The selection process varies, with some courses involving merit-based shortlisting and others requiring specific entrance exams.
STEP 3: Entrance Exam for Programmes

For UG and PG programmes, candidates are required to participate in the Common University Entrance Test (CUET). This national-level exam, conducted by the National Testing Agency, holds significance in the selection process for all programs.
STEP 4: Application Review and Shortlisting
Shortlisted candidates may undergo a review process, involving a meticulous examination of academic records and relevant qualifications to ensure alignment with the course requirements.
STEP 5: Admission Confirmation

Successful candidates receive notification of their admission status through official communication channels. To secure admission, candidates must complete the necessary formalities and submit the required documents within the stipulated deadline.
Please note: Admission through CUET is integrated into the admission process for specific programs, ensuring a fair and standardized evaluation for aspiring students.

faqs.question: What is the career scope after completing BPharm from Alpine Group of Institutes?
faqs.answer: After completing BPharm course from Alpine Group of Institutes, students will get a Bachelor of Pharmacy (BPharm) degree and become Registered Pharmacists. BPharm graduates are well-equipped to work in academic institutions, government research organisations, pharmaceutical industries, and R&D departments, because of their strong foundation in pharmaceutical sciences. According to college website career opportunities after BPharm degree are as follows – Production and Manufacturing: Bulk Drugs, Formulations, Cosmetics, Nutraceuticals etc. Quality Control: Analytical Chemist in Quality Control laboratory, Quality Assurance Department Research & Development (R&D): New medicines discovery, Formulation Development, Analytical Method Development Clinical trials, Bioequivalence & Bioavailability Studies, etc. Regulatory Affairs: Drug product marketing authorization/ Dossier stuffing Intellectual Property Right (IPR): Patent & Trade mark Data Management: Clinical Data operation, Pharmacovigilance Clinical Hospital Pharmacy: Hospital Pharmacist, Clinical Research Associate Sales and Marketing: Product management, Market Research, Medical Representative Entrepreneurship: Setting up of Pharmaceutical industry, Retail and Wholesale of Drugs and Pharmaceuticals Government Jobs: Drug Inspector, Food Inspector, Government Analyst at State and Central drug testing laboratories, Hospital Pharmacist Higher Education: MPharm

faqs.question: What are the career opportunities one can get after completing the BSc from Alpine Group of Institutes?
faqs.answer: The Bachelor of Science course of Alpine Group of Institutes, is to give students the comprehensive, valuable education and mentorship that are required for students to get good careeer and job opportunities. Here are names of some job profile mentioned at college website, that a candidate can get after doing BSc course at Alpine Group of Institutes: BSc in Agriculture BSc in IT BSc in Forestry BSc in Biotechnology BSc in AME Specialist officer (Agricultural Field Officer) Software Developer Forest Range Officer Biomedical Scientist Aircraft Maintenance Engineer Crop Consultant Network Engineer Crop Trial Officer Lab Technician Technical Writer Soil Scientist System Analyst Forest Ecologist Medical Science Liaison Aircraft Safety Inspector Junior Agricultural Associate Web Developer Park Ranger Biotechnologist Aviation Instructor Agricultural Engineer IT Project Manager Natural Resource Manager Pharmaceutical Sales Representative Aircraft Materials Manager

faqs.question: How is the placement for DPharm at Alpine Group of Institutes?
faqs.answer: Based on the reviews provided, the placement scenario for the DPharm programme at Alpine Group of Institutes appears to be generally decent. Review 1: 80% of students were placed in my course. The highest package in my course is INR1.4 Lacs and the lowest package in my course is INR 1.3 lakh. cipla, Mankind, etc. are the top recruiters. 80% students got internship from my course in companies like mankind, cipla, etc. Very good roles are offered in this course. Review 2: The highest salary package offered is INR 1.4 LPA. The lowest salary package offered is INR 1.3 LPA. Almost 85% of students got internships from our course in Cipla Company, etc. Conclusively, The placement scenario for the DPharm programme at Alpine Group of Institutes appears to be generally positive. A high percentage of students (80-85%) are successfully placed or secure internships, indicating a strong connection with reputable pharmaceutical companies like Cipla and Mankind. The salary packages, while relatively modest (ranging from INR 1.3 LPA to INR 1.4 LPA), are consistent across reviews.

faqs.question: What is the fees for DPharm at Alpine Group of Institutes?
faqs.answer: DPharm (Diploma in Pharmacy) is a two year Diploma course available at Alpine Group of Institutes, offered in full-time mode. The total fee for the DPharm programme include different components such as; tuition fee, hostel fee, mess charges, etc. To complete the admission process, candidates must submit the admission fee in advance. This payment is required to secure a seat in the programme and finalise their enrollment. The tuition fee for DPharm programme is INR 90,000 . This fee information is sourced from the official website/sanctioning body and is subject to change; therefore, it is indicative.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.E. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2023
reviews_list.review_title: Quite an impressive education.

review_content.Placements: I am a 2023 graduate, and I am totally disappointed with my college placements. Even in recession, many other colleges had a good placement rate, but our college had such a bad placement rate. Only 14 companies visited our campus, and only 5 of them were software-based. 3 were core electronics, others were coaching institutes and non-teaching like Sales executive. The highest package was 7 LPA, but of the pool campus, 3.6 LPA was the lowest. Amarakosha, Vegam, Minfy were a few companies.
review_content.Infrastructure: Labs are good and have good instructors and equipment. But one thing is that equipment are not enough and get outnumbered by the number of students. Faculty members are knowledgeable but do not have an interest in teaching us; most of them are like that. Only a few of the faculty members are supportive and help us to skill up.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.E. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: Decent college, but it could be better.

review_content.Placements: The college's placement scenario is not up to par. The majority of companies that visit the campus for hiring are mass recruiters. No on-campus hiring or assistance is provided for internships. The highest package offered in most of the years is 3.5 LPA. Although a decent percentage of students get hired each year, most of the hiring is not for a specified role.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the college is decent enough. The buildings were recently built and in good condition. The college has decent lab facilities. Most of the faculty is supportive enough to provide additional support to an extent if needed. The college does not have an on-campus hostel facility, but the hostels are provided a little farther away (on the outskirts of the city). The conditions of the hostel are average at best. The most common norm is to stay in private hostels in the city since the bus facility provided by the college is pretty good and has convenient timings.

review_summary.college_name: K.L.E Society's K.L.E Institute of Technology Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: College is good and placement will be dependent on the students.

content.Placements: 75% of students were placed in this course. The highest package was 18 lacs per annum, and the lowest package was 300000 rupees. The average package is 6 lacs rupees. Top recruiting companies are TCS, and more companies will hire, but the students must be skilled.
content.Infrastructure: The hostel is good for food and living, but sometimes electricity goes out, Wi-Fi is very weak, and there are no shops nearby. Our hostel is in a very remote area, and we will share with members in one room that is a BHK flat. I would like to say that it is a college hostel.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Good and traditional culture, excellent infrastructure. Strict rules and regulations, good teaching.

content.Placements: Less chance of placement but I think it may increase as days pass. I think there are not many students who are placed in our college but there are companies that come to college to take interviews for all students and if they are not placed we can’t blame the college it's our responsibility to build skills and crack interviews.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure for our course and hostel is very good. Facilities are very nice in the hostel with good food and all but there is a problem with the Wi-Fi, It has been 2 semesters but I don't even know the password of Wi-Fi and we can't connect to Wi-Fi. Worst experience. The Library is very good and clean. Labs are good. The Classrooms are clean and good. Sports, games, canteen, mess, medical facilities everything is available in our college.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: Quite an impressive education.

content.Placements: I am a 2023 graduate, and I am totally disappointed with my college placements. Even in recession, many other colleges had a good placement rate, but our college had such a bad placement rate. Only 14 companies visited our campus, and only 5 of them were software-based. 3 were core electronics, others were coaching institutes and non-teaching like Sales executive. The highest package was 7 LPA, but of the pool campus, 3.6 LPA was the lowest. Amarakosha, Vegam, Minfy were a few companies.
content.Infrastructure: Labs are good and have good instructors and equipment. But one thing is that equipment are not enough and get outnumbered by the number of students. Faculty members are knowledgeable but do not have an interest in teaching us; most of them are like that. Only a few of the faculty members are supportive and help us to skill up.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Decent college, but it could be better.

content.Placements: The college's placement scenario is not up to par. The majority of companies that visit the campus for hiring are mass recruiters. No on-campus hiring or assistance is provided for internships. The highest package offered in most of the years is 3.5 LPA. Although a decent percentage of students get hired each year, most of the hiring is not for a specified role.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the college is decent enough. The buildings were recently built and in good condition. The college has decent lab facilities. Most of the faculty is supportive enough to provide additional support to an extent if needed. The college does not have an on-campus hostel facility, but the hostels are provided a little farther away (on the outskirts of the city). The conditions of the hostel are average at best. The most common norm is to stay in private hostels in the city since the bus facility provided by the college is pretty good and has convenient timings.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Electrical Engineering - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: I am satisfied with the faculty, but not with placements, salary packages, or campus life.

content.Placements: The average salary package offered in our branch is about 5 LPA. We can get into IT companies as assistant engineers. In the previous year, placements improved.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the college is above average. It's full of greenery and has a peaceful vibe for studying. The food in the canteen is not good, and we've been complaining to the authorities about it. The quality and taste of the food are not worth the money we pay.
content.Faculty: The pass percentage of our branch was about 47% in the previous year. These are the toughest branch. So the percentage might be this low. Exams are tough as we're under VTU, Belgaum.

reviews.review_heading: Our college has good infrastructure and provides good bus facility, Wi-Fi, and library.
reviews.review_text: Our college has good infrastructure. Laboratory is well-equipped with good systems and LAN connectivity. Garden is available with many trees. A pond with fish, tortoises, and ducks are available on campus. Our classrooms are also well-equipped. Wi-Fi is available, and it also provides a library.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with the faculty and infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: Hostels are very good and are also well maintained. There are many facilities like a gym, sports, etc. The security around the hostel is good. The food is not that good. There is no ground. Labs are good.

reviews.review_heading: I didn't get the opportunity to get into core industry.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is good and location of the college is good. The facilities inside the college like canteen, Wi-Fi, textbooks, etc. are good to use. reviews.review_heading: Placement is good and still more opportunities for internships should be provided.

The canteen is clean but tastes should be improved for which they cost. Sports facilities should be improved.

reviews.review_heading: Our college gives the best experience.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is good. Library is the best place to study and enjoy. Classes are well furnished with full of beautiful nature.

reviews.review_heading: Our college has good infrastructure, good placements, supportive faculty members and seniors.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is good. There are well-equipped laboratories and access to Wi-Fi on laptops. The hostel is far from campus but is very tidy. The mess and canteen are available both on campus and at the hostel. The hostel is well maintained and laundry is available on charge.

reviews.review_heading: Overall, it is a good college to get in to where the staff members are co-operative.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is good with the modern architecture. The labs provide most of the equipment and tools for the relevant studies. The hostel provides quality food and maintains cleanliness and hygiene. The bus facilities for the students from the hostel are convenient.

reviews.review_heading: Very good library facilities.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure was good and well-ventilated area. Plantings are amazing and smart classes are available with a projector. The library was too good every book are available for our academic. In the hostel, food facilities are good and hygiene is maintained very well.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with this college.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is excellent in our college and labs and classes are maintained in a very good manner. Wi-Fi is available in our college. The library is very good and has a number of books. I am not in the hostel so I didn't about the mess and all. Canteen is available on our campus and we have a very good canteen. All types of foods are available, and medical facilities are also provided.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Civil Engineering - Batch of 2018
reviews_list.review_title: Dissatisfied because of faculty, placement is not good, sports and medical facility are also bad.

review_content.Placements: The placement in this college is not good. Some companies come here but the companies who come there was not any big and better company. At 21/03/2018 six companies visited to this college for the placement. The name of some companies are Airtel, FACE, UAA and other companies. Some students were selected from management.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of this College is not bad but also not much better. The Wi-FI facility is available there. There are wi-fi from jio company who gives 1GB per day on per free on per mobile num from any network. There are good lab facility. Internet lab is available in all branches. Nice classrooms There. Sports and medical facility is very bad.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Computer Application (BCA) - Batch of 2016
reviews_list.review_title: A good place to learn discipline with knowledge.

review_content.Placements: There were no placements on campus for my seniors, and even I was the only student from my batch who was selected for a job in Vista soft.com. review_summary.college_name: OM Group of Institutions Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Civil Engineering - Batch of 2019
individual_reviews.title: My college is better than other colleges in all aspects.

content.Placements: Placement drives for our batch are going to be conducted next year but my senior batch got placements this year. Almost 20% of students were placed, and the highest salary offered is 3 lacs per annum. Three national and multinational companies visited the campus for placements. They conducted direct interviews and selected the students.
content.Infrastructure: The campus is fully equipped with Wi-Fi. There are smart classrooms, digital library, better quality labs like a computer lab, transport labs, soil labs, survey labs, chemistry lab, etc. Good quality of food is available in the campus canteen. There are around 300 hostel rooms which are fully air-conditioned.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Civil Engineering - Batch of 2015
individual_reviews.title: My graduation event from OM GROUP OF INSTITUTIONS.

content.Placements: They will insist to do in college training and placement will luckily you will find. Some engineering student would have maximum package of 3lpa. Never think you will get the job by campus placement so you have go outside campus for placement. I am just talking about B.Tech. Other courses just like MBA B.Com Polytechnic. I don't know about it.
content.Infrastructure: No doubt they have beautiful, well designed, and fully fledged buildings. About library this is on 3rd floor without any A. C. and Lift facility so you will also skip to go there. Canteen food is moderate you can find there some cold drink and wafer there not so much options to eat. Campus not have the Wi-Fi facility Once you entered the college they will open the GATE after 5 pm for, it's sounds a jail type environment created for students.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Civil Engineering - Batch of 2018
individual_reviews.title: Dissatisfied because of faculty, placement is not good, sports and medical facility are also bad.

content.Placements: The placement in this college is not good. Some companies come here but the companies who come there was not any big and better company. At 21/03/2018 six companies visited to this college for the placement. The name of some companies are Airtel, FACE, UAA and other companies. Some students were selected from management.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of this College is not bad but also not much better. The Wi-FI facility is available there. There are wi-fi from jio company who gives 1GB per day on per free on per mobile num from any network. There are good lab facility. Internet lab is available in all branches. Nice classrooms There. Sports and medical facility is very bad.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Computer Application (BCA) - Batch of 2016
individual_reviews.title: A good place to learn discipline with knowledge.

content.Placements: There were no placements on campus for my seniors, and even I was the only student from my batch who was selected for a job in Vista soft.com. But the college always tries to attract more companies for placement drive. The college always sends students of the college to other for the off-campus drive.
content.Infrastructure: The Wi-Fi facility is available all the time. The classrooms are quite good. There are sufficient computers in a lab to attend 3 class at a time. The infrastructure wise it is also good and classy. The canteen can be better with the better place. The library is also good, but all the books are not available.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2018
individual_reviews.title: Dissatisfied because of placements. Good infrastructure and decent facilities.

content.Placements: The placement was very poor. Only 4-5 students out of 55 were placed. They got an offer of Rs. 10,000-20,000 per month. Only a few companies visited the campus. The average stipend was Rs. 15,000. As no one got an internship, only theoretical knowledge is provided. This college is very backward regarding placement.
content.Infrastructure: The facilities provided to the students are fine. There is free Wi-Fi for students as well as for teaching and non-teaching staff. Lab facilities are good, classrooms are fine, but medical facilities are slightly poor. Different sports and games are organized at college and intercollege level. The food provided by the canteen is very unhealthy, they only provide cold drinks, junk food, and tea. The hostel rooms are decent. There is no stationery or any other shop near the college, and the nearest one is 3-4 kilometers away.

paragraphs: OM Group of Institutions admissionis through qualifying exam scores of the candidates. The institute offers courses at UG, PG and After 10th levels in streams includingEngineering, Business and Management Studies, IT and Software and Architecture and Planning.OM Group of Institutionsadmission is granted based on performance of the aspirants in exams, such asJEE Main, GATE, and CAT. Candidates have to pay a total tuition fee ofINR 37,400 - 2,62,000for UG, PG and After 10th level. Besides tuition fee, students also need to pay caution deposit, exam fee, hostel fee, etc.
Typically, the duration of the UG level courses ranges between 3 years - 5 years.

faqs.question: How many seats are available for various courses offered at OM Group of Institutions?

faqs.question: What is the eligibility to get admission in OM Group of Institutions for UG/PG courses?
faqs.answer:
OM Group of Institutions has below criteria for taking admissions to it's various courses:CoursesEligibilityB.E. / B.TechCandidate must have passed Diploma in Engineering from a recognized board with minimum 45%.BCACandidate must have passed 10+2/ Diploma from a recognized board.BBACandidate must have passed 10+2 or equivalent examination from a recognized school/board.M.ArchGATE qualified candidates will be given preference.B.ArchCandidate who have passed 10+3 Diploma Examination with Mathematics as compulsory subject with at least 50% marks in aggregate from a recognized Institute/ University can also apply.
Candidates appearing for 10+3 Diploma with Mathematics in the current year may also provisionally appear for NATA-2023.After 10th DiplomaCandidate must have passed 10th Std/ SSC Examination from a recognized board.UG DiplomaCandidate must have passed 10th Std/ SSC Examination from a recognized board.

review_content.General: Faculty members were generally very positive. They were highly qualified, experienced, and helpful professors. Many holding PhDs, who taught in English and fostered good student interaction. They prepared students well for the industry through practical learning and support. Students improved their subject expertise, professionalism, and ability to learn effectively, though some reviews mentioned that faculty from North India taught only in English, which could be an advantage for communication skills. All the staff members were highly educated. They created a supportive environment and were always willing to help students, especially with career guidance. Their friendly and encouraging nature made the learning experience enjoyable for us.

review_content.Placements: In our college, the percentage of students who passed 4 years is 60% and some of them get backlogs. In our senior batch, some of them are in disciplinary action. The highest package in the college is 31 LPA after taking the coaching in Bengaluru. Roles offered in the course are mainly the backend and frontend developer. Documentation is very important in jobs and the skills are mostly important.
review_content.Infrastructure: There is a Wi-Fi problem in the college and per head 1.5 GB is not enough for a student in the daytime. The quality of the food is good in the college rather compared to the other Lakireddy Bali Reddy College.

individual_reviews.course: M.Tech. in Machine Design - Batch of 2020
individual_reviews.title: The college has good placements and infrastructure, with a good environment.

content.Placements: Placements were okay. Most companies were product-based, but bulk hiring happened only for service-based projects. The highest package was 32 LPA, the lowest package was 3 LPA, and the average package was 5 LPA. Top recruiting companies included Infosys, Wipro, Cognizant, and TCS.
content.Infrastructure: College had a beautiful view with green trees and a garden. Environment was peaceful, but busy with students. Transport facilities were provided from the campus, or we could also go by public transport. Sports and cultural activities took place. Full security was provided for hostels as well as for the college.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2020
individual_reviews.title: The college has good infrastructure and offers good placements.

content.Placements: Placements started in the 7th and 8th semesters. Our college placements were excellent. The salary package offered was 8 LPA to 10 LPA. Placement guidance was provided beforehand. Nowadays, no placements are coming to other colleges, but we were happy with our placements.
content.Infrastructure: The college atmosphere was excellent, with greenery, a beautiful campus, and a good environment. The infrastructure was excellent. Laboratories were well-equipped to perform activities.
content.Faculty: Faculty members were generally very positive. They were highly qualified, experienced, and helpful professors. Many holding PhDs, who taught in English and fostered good student interaction. They prepared students well for the industry through practical learning and support. Students improved their subject expertise, professionalism, and ability to learn effectively, though some reviews mentioned that faculty from North India taught only in English, which could be an advantage for communication skills. All the staff members were highly educated. They created a supportive environment and were always willing to help students, especially with career guidance. Their friendly and encouraging nature made the learning experience enjoyable for us.

The hygienic food is not provided I think in my mind here the food is limited for the non-veg.

reviews.review_heading: About RK College, the educational steps lead to success.
reviews.review_text: The Wi-Fi is not a problem in the college and the hostels. Daily, the students receive 1.5 GB in college, and the hostel food is very good, offering a lot of items. The canteen food is also very good.

reviews.review_heading: Really good infrastructure.
reviews.review_text:
The facilities were very good.
The faculty are well educated, they made everything easy for us and they will guide us. The campus consists of many classrooms, a large library and labs and free Wi-Fi. 
Hostel facilities are there.

reviews.review_heading: Faculty and placements are excellent.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure and facilities are excellent in our college. There are many departments in our college. They provide labs and digital classrooms. They provide hostel facility and medical facilities, and they encourage sports like cricket, volleyball, etc.

reviews.review_heading: Review of R K College of Engineering.
reviews.review_text: There are many facilities provided by our college management like labs, spacious and digital classrooms, and a library with a huge collection of books. There are many branches in our college. The provided hostel facilities and medical facilities.

reviews.review_heading: I am very satisfied with facilities of this college.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is very good. Many useful books are available in libraries. Laboratories are well-equipped. The food quality is good. A first-aid kit is also available. Doctors are also available at this college. Sports are conducted such as kabaddi, cricket, throwball, etc. Our campus has good environment.

reviews.review_heading: This campus is neither good nor bad.
reviews.review_text: There is no Wi-Fi. There are no advanced labs. The hostel rooms are not clean. Food is not good. They do not conduct sports for girls. They do not allow girls to go to the ground.

reviews.review_heading: Our college is excellent.
reviews.review_text: R.K. College had good facilities like a canteen. The cricket ground, volleyball court, and kabaddi court were available. There was Wi-Fi, but mobile phones were strictly prohibited. The food in the mess was good. Medical and hostel facilities were available in our college. Boys and girls had separate hostels.

reviews.review_heading: Faculty are good and comfortable with students. They help in many situations.
reviews.review_text: It's a very reasonable price for hostel and food. It's very little compared with surrounding colleges and other colleges. You will definitely be satisfied with fee and course structure. It's very reasonable in all aspects, but we need to pay on time.

reviews.review_heading: Discipline and hard work are very important.
reviews.review_text: Facilities like Wi-Fi, library, classrooms, ground, volleyball cricket and kabaddi, etc., were available on campus. Games were available at our college and every day, we play games at the ground. Carrom, chess, and badminton rackets were also available at our college. Our PET sir was also a very good trainer for all games. The classrooms were very nice and student-friendly. The library was fantastic with good knowledge books and magazines available. A good sports auditorium was available. The fo...

highlights.summary:
The JEE Main 2026 registration for session 2 has closed for Hon. Shri. Babanrao Pachpute Vichardhara Trust's Parikrama Group of Institutions admission to BTech, BArch and BPlan courses. The session 2 exams will be conducted from Apr 2 to Apr 9, 2026.

Here are some additional updates regarding the Hon. Shri. Babanrao Pachpute Vichardhara Trust's Parikrama Group of Institutions:

fees_and_eligibility.overview: Hon. Shri. Babanrao Pachpute Vichardhara Trust's Parikrama Group of Institutions offers various programmes at UG and PG levels. Students can choose Full Time courses from plethora of streams such as Engineering, Medicine & Health Sciences and Business & Management Studies. At the UG level, students can choose from courses, namely B.E. / B.Tech, B.Pharma and D.Pharma. On the other hand, at the PG level, the Hon. Shri. Babanrao Pachpute Vichardhara Trust's Parikrama Group of Institutions offers M.E./M.Tech, MBA/PGDM and MCA. The fees for Hon. Shri. Babanrao Pachpute Vichardhara Trust's Parikrama Group of Institutions courses range between INR 12,000 to 4,23,284.

overview_faqs.question: What do Electrical Engineering professionals do?
overview_faqs.answer: Electrical Engineering professionals are engineering jack of all trades, as they make use of their knowledge of Physics and Mathematics along with computer programming skills to develop intricate circuit systems. These circuit boards run electrical signals to and from electrical components to accomplish everything from a mundane computer startup to controlling absolute power and precision of a rocket going out of earth's atmosphere.Know more about -Electrical Engineering Courses

faqs.question: What can students do after JEE Main session 2 result?
faqs.answer: After JEE session 2 is completed, only those candidates who are aiming for IITs need to start preparing for JEE Advanced after clearing JEE Main. Those who are above the 98th percentile should start preparing for JEE Advanced as soon as possible. Those below this, between the 95th and 98th percentile, should focus on attempting more mock tests and previous year question papers so that they have a better chance of clearing JEE Advanced

reviews.review_heading: It is a good college with good infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: In our hostel, fresh food is provided for every student. Healthy food is available. In the hostel, free Wi-Fi access is for all students. There are also student labs available. Good medical facilities are available in the hostel, and the canteen is very big with every type of sport available.

reviews.review_heading: College has very good infrastructure and better placements.
reviews.review_text: In our college, the infrastructure is very good, and the roads are very nice. There are different courses and separate labs available in our college, and three Wi-Fi access points are available for every student. The classrooms are e-classrooms and smart classrooms. In our hostels, food is very good, and healthy foods are provided to students, along with mineral water and various different varieties of food and snacks available for students.

reviews.review_heading: Our college is good, we have good facilities and good staff also, and we have a big campus.
reviews.review_text: Our college has labs for practicals like the mechanical lab, computer lab, and medical lab. Our college provides us with free Wi-Fi access, which is good for us. The college has a library, which is the most useful thing. Our hostel has nice rooms, and the mess food is also good.

reviews.review_heading: The college has very good infrastructure and a better placement rate.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure in our college is very good. Roads are well-maintained. Free Wi-Fi access is available. Separate labs are provided for each course. Hostel food is of good quality and healthy, and filtered water is available.

reviews.review_heading: There is very good infrastructure and absolutely very good placements in our college since 2015.
reviews.review_text: In our college, good infrastructure and good roads and grounds are available. Free Wi-Fi access is available. Separate classrooms are available, and in our hostel good quality food is provided. Filtered water is given, and all sports grounds and games are available.

reviews.review_heading: There is a very good college with infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: The college has good infrastructure, and free Wi-Fi is available. Each department has a separate library. Hostel food is of good quality. Filtered water is available. The hostel has a gym and other facilities.

reviews.review_heading: The college has good infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: In my college, the entire campus is covered with Wi-Fi. All departments have separate classrooms. All departments have their own labs for their respective work or practicals. In our college, there is a massive library where all types of books are available.

reviews.review_heading: We have a beautiful campus and good infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: The department provides digital classrooms, digital labs, libraries, and other facilities. The hostel offers quality food and many amenities like a gym, study hall, sick room, and other available facilities. Sports are always the first priority for boys and top of the sports.

reviews.review_heading: The college has good infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: In our campus, the infrastructure is very good, with a big ground and different courses having separate classrooms and labs. All types of books are available in the library. In our hostel, free Wi-Fi access is provided. The hostel serves fresh and healthy food to students, and there is a big canteen.

reviews.review_heading: The college has very good infrastructure, and it gives the placement opportunity.
reviews.review_text: My college infrastructure is very beautifully decorated and developed. The labs are clean, and students get unlimited Wi-Fi. The college library provides books for all semesters and all courses. In the hostel, there are separate rooms for all students. Each student gets a table and chair for study.

reviews.review_heading: In our college, there were good placements in 2015 and a normal infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: Our college infrastructure is very good, and the campus is clean. There are separate labs for all courses, and smart classrooms are available. There is a big library and free Wi-Fi access. In our hostel, they give fresh food, filtered water, and healthy food for students.

reviews.review_heading: Parikrama faculty of engineering, A-NAAC accreditation, because of the infrastructure and placement.
reviews.review_text: Parikrama College is the best college in terms of infrastructure. Parikrama is spread over 110 acres. There are separate classrooms for every department with projectors. The seating arrangement is also good. They provide a large library with various types of books. You can take books from the library and go to the reading hall for your studies. This place is very quiet. Wi-Fi is also provided in the library, classrooms and also in the hostel. Now, about the hostel, it has 4 floors. Mess food is ...

reviews.review_heading: There are very good faculty in our college, and average students are placed in good companies.
reviews.review_text: In our college, there is a big ground and very good infrastructure. There are separate labs for separate courses, and a big canteen in our college, and Wi-Fi access is available for students in our hostel. The food quality is very good. And filtered water is included in hostel facilities.

reviews.review_heading: Our college is good and has good facilities and a good teaching staff.
reviews.review_text: Our college has a very big campus of around 200 acres. This provides us with very good roads. We also have access to Wi-Fi, and we also have big labs and classrooms, and the college also provides very good library facilities. Our hostel provides decent accommodation and good quality of food, and our hostel also filters water, has a big sports ground and other sports equipment.

reviews.review_heading: The college could perform better in placements and labs.
reviews.review_text: The college infrastructure is very good, especially for Computer Engineering. The college has three Wi-Fi servers and three labs. Many classrooms for other departments as well. Each classroom has a projector installed for students. The hostel is also good, with good food quality. The hostel has its own medical ward and sports equipment. It includes cricket kits, badminton, and football.
